subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
AOC Gets Served No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qulvhd-trhiujldw-jy/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* They are coming for your **[air conditioner](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-y/).**
* Most people**[can't afford](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-j/) **an electric vehicle.
* Biden thinks **[Kamala is doing a bad job](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* [**Ukraine is out of ammo**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-i/)
* **[Americans are less](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-d/)** religious and patriotic.
* **[Christian school shooting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-h/)** in Nashville. **[Bodycam footage](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-k/)** has been released.
* 70-car **[train derailment](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-u/)** in North Dakota.
* The **[right is under attack](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-o/)**!
* They're **[coming for your guns](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* **[Biden jokes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-m/)** about hate crimes against Christians.
* The **[well-being gap](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-c/)** between liberals and conservatives.
* Former President **[Trump indicted](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-q/)**!
* Insurrections in **[Kentucky](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-a/)** and **[Tennessee](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-f/).**
* **[Hush money](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-z/).**

### **Sympathizing with Evil**
## Conservatives [**slam Karine Jean-Pierre for saying the trans community is 'under attack**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-v/)[ _'_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-e/) days after a transgender shooter murdered six people at a Tennessee school. Biden [**declared Friday** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-s/)Transgender Day of Visibility.

### **AOC Served**
[**Progressive firebrand AOC has been served with an ethics complaint** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-g/)by an outside group that accuses her of 'defaming' the creator of the Libs of TikTok on Twitter. **Migrant Babies Thrown Over the Border** In a frantic scene at the border, [**dozens of babies and small children were thrown over the river that separates the US from Mexico in El Paso, Texas**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-w/), as more than 1,000 migrants rushed the border. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-yk/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-yu/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-jl/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qulvhd-trhiujldw-jr/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

# **Why Is China
Hoarding Food?**
**EXCLUSIVE: Experts warn China's massive food hoarding will lead to food shortages in America** China is hoarding a massive amount of food, and the U.S. Department of Agriculture confirms China will soon have **_69% of the globe's corn reserves, 60% of its rice and 51% of its wheat._** What does this mean for Americans like you and me? 2 words: **food shortages** _"Control the food, control the people."_ Right now, there are 38 million Americans struggling with food insecurity, and experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point." John Boyd Jr, a 4th-generation American farmer, warns: _"Food shortage is coming."_ **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** And if you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. * Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...

EXCLUSIVE: Experts warn China's massive food hoarding will lead to food shortages in America China is hoarding a massive amount of food, and the U.S. Department of Agriculture confirms China will soon have 69% of the globe's corn reserves, 60% of its rice and 51% of its wheat. What does this mean for Americans like you and me? 2 words: food shortages "Control the food, control the people." Right now, there are 38 million Americans struggling with food insecurity, and experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point." John Boyd Jr, a 4th-generation American farmer, warns: "Food shortage is coming." As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.

**Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.

subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfai60m58s4b45kvmm9eaa05vhbn5gshd9vrl3vg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or6c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh29117gs0vr6blec7n5g4bfdp7750fp3bp43vb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or6c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb6hvq20ooko4tvm0gs0jd6dkj29l9r3h3ljcp00_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or6c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb2424se7ivjtrhs0bdpsnoj5grp9oba7gp6dm58_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or2chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeimnup85lv3sdt9ref4d5gjf3c18u60g4rha50o_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or2chh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zse16bfjkp5qsdla1et5j2prh412hgltrrfcp938_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or2chh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrs89o33qusphg3en4mi5ujs88h5rrku91lusbs8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5h69or2chh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.
Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer.
**Never before in our Nation’s history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.
The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first.
_**But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. **_
_**With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic.**_
**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsbzzYhDNz

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osbzzYhDNz

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme
Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the
nation's highest court: "My job is to apply the Constitution."

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me

name: American Briefing
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd0agj55ic74r476va8cndl7r38ue7qoenn6e8pg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2mdgnn3khfr8tnldpqbnutrorssq1gl76gq66fo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2c5h2bs)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6neov6h9079gfs7tn5b18ljd0ba41rg1tbok7po_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2c5h2bs)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl1mcca00pjlhemv7kgd5folnv91d3ei5vvv1ua8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd1u49fij2qsvap8fupjfg8d09fvg5623vhue7c8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1jmep30c1h238h1e8he4933c3g62pj6c9h62oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za0svfp041tmdtramoh6icdriqap5ra7okf8kg28_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2c5h2bs)_

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---

---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znbnooe892ls79lbhc9euj33fjus627jho57frf0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6coj2cph2bs "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?")**

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gfi%2fUaWn42rZREj4LgQcBQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gfi%2fUaWn42rZREj4LgQcBQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ysQbX%2bc%2bHFwPpzYMjVegGQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654980%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o1axAUsnhPqijJkChGcgjA&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654981%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qWeQO4Q5KQ8peLJVgyYrwg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654982%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4xdmNZmxbeQ5oct%2fvkxwXA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fG3GAjdwGTOtyVUzokrvzA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654984%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dby2PZR6j8NqqY4GY7AyDQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654995%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f8rcuPQmjg95bDzeNr3AvQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654996%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vHym6Geg%2fh3ADJ3wCkzDgg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654997%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7RTYoCfGdRIZbucN1R13xg&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654998%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PzIi3lkhUA5Y%2f%2bjHsbmgwg&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654999%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n%2bx9aSquBLR%2bS3QH8xC8Jg&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654990%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ONDJpQxs5WuG5n1nts3nQ&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654991%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bxe%2bfM67t4mZKeY5Im8njQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Activate your membership
body:
The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh88oe3q27u3u9j4u19qtcn3pjm5g46icnmrev28_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6ao35cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zroobt9r9mbh5i0truuf513jrbrgesc8sqrm1vno_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j6ao35cdh2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zclggf4u1ppeadl1orh9q5k6nni51kp8dqaa46i0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zat2t09f65ou4rm2qmmbk19af895q4sb3efsotfo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu6hval4bqlhgrq9tgaqth5s4qghc8387i28g36o_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztrhs13o6lbra8ish7lspnp5nneif059rcgcdkp0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1jmep34c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksvnmt03u23dtrrijrdt6goe1uob866rmcu8oq8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeqrvph799ab41uhjifsqus3upuaupraogegv9ro_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o72clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

---

---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---
| | | _Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
Tom Carper (D-Del.)
Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.)
Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.)
Michael Bennet (D-Colo.)

Mark Warner (D-Va.)
Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.)
Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.)
Peter Welch (D-Vt.)
Sheldon Whitehouse (D-R.I.)
Ron Wyden (D-Ore.)._

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5la0tbje1h679gusmtmr7rnac9eum108c341nro_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o76cjh2bs)
---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvhbfks1s3f9erikccqs2se6vqo7ihtgr7mpthog_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j66o76cjh2bs "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?")**

---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

name: Alan Keck
subject: re: It’s important that you see this.
body:
I sent you this personal video message on the cusp of my most important fundraising deadline yet, the March end-of-quarter deadline, and wanted to make sure you saw it.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-r/) It's important that you see this. [__**I sent you this personal video message on the cusp of my most important fundraising deadline yet, the March end-of-quarter deadline, and wanted to make sure you saw it.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-j/) I stayed up past the deadline to see where we landed... _and unfortunately, we fell just short ... __You know by now that I don 't like asking for resources or for money, **but I can 't emphasize enough how impactful your support of time, talent or treasure is in such a crowded race.**_This deadline was so important to spreading our message-[__**our Keck Game Plan**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-t/)-across the Commonwealth, and _I 'm reaching out again because I've asked my team to extend that deadline for a few short hours, [_**so you have the chance to make a defining impact that might just tip the scales in this race.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-i/)_ [CHIP-IN $5 | 1% OF OUR REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-d/) [CHIP-IN $25 | 5% OF OUR REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-h/) [CHIP-IN $50 | 10% OF OUR REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-k/) [CHIP-IN $100 | 20% OF OUR REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-u/) [CHIP-IN $500 | 100% OF OUR REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-o/) [_**So, please don 't wait-we're eagerly waiting to hear back from you.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-b/) Only together can we prove that Kentucky Wins, for this generation and the next.Thank you and God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-n/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-p/) Alan Keck From: Alan KeckDate: 31 March, 2023Subject: I know you're busy. _I know you 're busy, _[__**but I want to take just a minute to share a personal update**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-x/) _on where we are in this race. _⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-m/) [WATCH MY PERSONAL MESSAGE TO YOU](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-c/) We're building so much momentum and I am energized and encouraged every single day. Our message-[__**the Keck Game Plan**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-q/) -_is resonating, and more and more people are jumping on board. __**But we 're getting to the end of the fiscal quarter, close to the end of another financial deadline and **_[_**_I need your help._**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-a/) _The more that we can raise, the more that you can support, the easier it is for us to share this message.__**It 's never fun to ask for resources or money, but I'm going to come to you again and say I need your time, your talent and your treasure.**_ [__**Whether it 's $5, $25 or $500, help us hit our NEW GOAL of $2,500**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-f/) so we can continue to share this message of hope and opportunity, of growing our economy, talking about public safety, education and the pro-family policy that so many of you love. [CHIP-IN $5 | <1% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-z/) [CHIP-IN $25 | 1% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-v/) [CHIP-IN $50 | 2% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-e/) [CHIP-IN $100 | 4% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-s/) [CHIP-IN $500 | 20% OF OUR NEW GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-g/) I'm grateful for what you've already done, [__**but I need you to lean in and sacrifice with me and together, we 'll prove Kentucky Wins.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-w/)Thank you and God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-yd/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-yh/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pqjtx-dytiuyidkd-yk/)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm70l3qamnv776u8g7e0vhqoduqtca4c3ld4gmlo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j61or0cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgken43ecg0mc5633ig6pc68g9t0tjr93bqoe25g_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j61or0cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfrrpqqv2g8sfastocdpu29lrg1l6el23hp1erp8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j61or0cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf7bbejcf83oic0vgqh3sv8ueacbssmu54m4jokg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5j61or0cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
This is NOT to be taken lightly.

| |

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

name: American Action News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk3e4tkm59ov676sampbs1j9e4rmbba8rn0h1vgg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5gm0ob2cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf58upfo1i9t5b5s3g8jtkviga448211stvvn58g_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5gm0ob2cdh2bs)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo6r61p5vcm07d61t4smq6nscnfh6mpruf9ihggg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5gm0ob2cdh2bs)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zerr4jscuq18jeji745m02tugn3v68t6sf7g5cbg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c5gm0ob2cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---

name: Defend Texas Fund
subject: Lone Star State Preservation
body:
| | | | In Texas, we don't depend on the help of the coastal elite...
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508538:6m8yw_GN9:m:1:3331421248:69FA3DE7A525292CC6755DF6F4B33EEA:r)
---
Peter,

The coastal elites in D.C., New York, and California think they run this country.

But while they're busy bickering back and forth, going to fancy dinners, and running this country into the ground, us Texans are the ones keeping the lights on.
---
* **We 're #1 in livestock production:** Texas leads the nation in revenue from beef sales and produces roughly 20% of the nation's cattle.

* **We 're #1 in cotton production:** Texas generates 29% of the nation's cotton revenue.

* **And we 're #1 in oil and natural gas:** Texas is responsible for 1/5 of the country's oil production and 1/3 of the natural gas supply of the U.S.

---
We're doing just fine for ourselves - but since the coastal elite have destroyed their own states, they're fleeing to Texas to reap the rewards we've worked so hard for.

__And the worst part is, they 're going to bring their failed ____**woke**__ __ideas and__ __**socialist**__ __policies with them.__

It's up to YOU to step up, protect and defend the Lone Star State from these out of state liberals.

[_**Will you make a contribution**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508538:6m8yw_GN9:m:1:3331421248:69FA3DE7A525292CC6755DF6F4B33EEA:r)[ _****_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508538:6m8yw_GN9:m:1:3331421248:69FA3DE7A525292CC6755DF6F4B33EEA:r)[_**to our Lone Star State Preservation Fund to ensure we have the resources we need to protect Texas from the influx of out-of-state coastal elites?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508538:6m8yw_GN9:m:1:3331421248:69FA3DE7A525292CC6755DF6F4B33EEA:r)
Recent data shows that between April 2020 and June of 2022, 884,144 people moved to Texas - and _1 out of every 10 was from California._

I guess when you consider that **Californians pay 13.3%** in state income tax and Texans don't pay income tax at all...it makes sense.

But even though they're moving because of our wonderful conservative policies...they'll still vote the same way they always have, for failed, socialist, liberal ideology.
---
_**They just don 't get it, it is what it is.**_
---
But it's up to YOU to ensure Texas is protected from their ignorance.

[_**So please, make a contribution to our Lone Star State Preservation Fund to ensure we have the resources we need to protect Texas from the influx of out-of-state coastal elites.**__**
**__**
**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508537:6m8yw_GN9:m:1:3331421248:69FA3DE7A525292CC6755DF6F4B33EEA:r) Thank you,
Defend Texas Fund
---
---
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a1600883e424ae190e862b1964097f3&_e=olrRDkc5bJb5kuTMc-DAXGkB1_NTHArMcbrQvbVKBm3vffOjMxrCYzSSIhfr-bMkUi0CHYhGMXOveSWmlm65KXEjWhZaqS7kLkYgb00aqfmiTaFUS82gNBawsoSDfxyW3yYnGUx9GjhxgxLH2cBf5Ix0RaH-8omiG6La6P5nk8W92qqlDHsA5kRHdprsej3mVnbqCoLpZQVIQfE1lYSnhodWLZwJ_NBOYifNx38GGuVxH-Zw9JUlYpxdFQlZN5TYCeBJ4SV_Xio391z2G5GsAfA03S1GkTFQ7Y54mdp5yR8wwra8So42yJmTZrbhGR9ZHgbfV4kMzefu8MGmH--c4-cDZuuu4w58HXwvjOTGxSSJixFa_wdCdekAyzv5gFkWZtSapsXVTKdlzfnCpQaclWkY4uqLnOdsGj4trXphjYI%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a1600883e424ae190e862b1964097f3&_e=olrRDkc5bJb5kuTMc-DAXGkB1_NTHArMcbrQvbVKBm3vffOjMxrCYzSSIhfr-bMkUi0CHYhGMXOveSWmlm65KXEjWhZaqS7kLkYgb00aqfmiTaFUS82gNBawsoSDfxyW3yYnGUx9GjhxgxLH2cBf5Ix0RaH-8omiG6La6P5nk8W92qqlDHsA5kRHdprsej3mVnbqCoLpZQVIQfE1lYSnhodWLZwJ_NBOYifNx38GGuVxH-Zw9JUlYpxdFQlZN5TYCeBJ4SV_Xio391z2G5GsATQ_W5H6I0BU77RYYq11VeKwgUSSmgcky1EClknU-yThAivcW5wr99wcBZi7E0dQi8IFCrWOnzP2PxDjRI4qFGA_W88q4i4VxukP821kYIDk_OSTOqdcWgatJczixn97sSX-2sZqlJYjrX_QlXJXkeE%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a1600883e424ae190e862b1964097f3&_e=olrRDkc5bJb5kuTMc-DAXGkB1_NTHArMcbrQvbVKBm3vffOjMxrCYzSSIhfr-bMkUi0CHYhGMXOveSWmlm65KXEjWhZaqS7kLkYgb00aqfmiTaFUS82gNBawsoSDfxyW3yYnGUx9GjhxgxLH2cBf5Ix0RaH-8omiG6La6P5nk8W92qqlDHsA5kRHdprsej3mVnbqCoLpZQVIQfE1lYSnhodWLZwJ_NBOYifNx38GGuVxH-Zw9JUlYpxdFQlZN5TYCeBJ4SV_Xio391z2G5GsAbTNHatiXDMMiqUVJdIr9ViH2aFtmRRJohl7eJ0iCeEifjlXIq5H_Gb8z6MayKoLYk0lVnr4tVdsxqxdH8-Bd3WC9MZcocz9EPV_pSZMq7qZxH6nO0HJD1KCNYmVaA3SfP3fP6uF3iYNyvuggZO2rek%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a1600883e424ae190e862b1964097f3&_e=olrRDkc5bJb5kuTMc-DAXGkB1_NTHArMcbrQvbVKBm3vffOjMxrCYzSSIhfr-bMkUi0CHYhGMXOveSWmlm65KXEjWhZaqS7kLkYgb00aqfmiTaFUS82gNBawsoSDfxyW3yYnGUx9GjhxgxLH2cBf5Ix0RaH-8omiG6La6P5nk8W92qqlDHsA5kRHdprsej3mVnbqCoLpZQVIQfE1lYSnhodWLZwJ_NBOYifNx38GGuVxH-Zw9JUlYpxdFQlZN5TYCeBJ4SV_Xio391z2G5GsAUdRBUt0Jaa14iUV3nxDm5tr1hfhlbv5s1H54FfZtFp9SRHsM13oTep7RZP4iOziQ3O8FJ25bxHtPGH7_oQdIB3PcPtWckJY5jDR1UBpaJluXJlky4pJi3WDPoL17MRsncsYykPC8TdRb-9AzYU-ce0%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=666054c02fc6400283f2f38d3dee9f88&_e=RH4_zwEwTVIVcUfWTWbiBI0G8ZLWgveZJROpkj1mOY-bPccO-HE_kVUn9QF9Cw5EdO26N-wa1cH4xM2ixFlE7AxQ11acSPfMwBnFF04NuKFZyT4Xwmp4vaiqu8Iwp6I3_RODHIYyMfnoYo9RL82YtE8hINdXej8ycznZLOUL7tDtPJfVIwuIVWn1zYmGSoG5cEodkTF4wBUcFfs_5bhbBHYxqQc8j0nwCL2eEhy3BQRaRXdkFYAll-6mUVIJC9P1qd22cIoPJqTDlg2DmWD7hC0y1v7XmtOYDwmSLM7heyLvmQjoH5nqob-ZSUJ8ci1KCo7Dz8_6H8fhAFsnKaYh2BTt7brVjL7VV5ThKOUNrkjZtgLwC1m8gWeBt2vr-hTmpMMGBzrAOEN2H6mY4_nfvw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=666054c02fc6400283f2f38d3dee9f88&_e=RH4_zwEwTVIVcUfWTWbiBI0G8ZLWgveZJROpkj1mOY-bPccO-HE_kVUn9QF9Cw5EdO26N-wa1cH4xM2ixFlE7AxQ11acSPfMwBnFF04NuKFZyT4Xwmp4vaiqu8Iwp6I3_RODHIYyMfnoYo9RL82YtE8hINdXej8ycznZLOUL7tDtPJfVIwuIVWn1zYmGSoG5cEodkTF4wBUcFfs_5bhbBHYxqQc8j0nwCL2eEhy3BQRaRXdkFYAll-6mUVIJC9P1-2IVmKK3i9x2w8eG04PTXlJCTk9ZL9NDbYh0yMT4HWng1PT6xfHcmYYJgy09VeNUEpbFd5pJTLj4jjDgcUJvPa8X7GBU0aYMmH92lfurdUkcS69d-dpSuvExV72F6pgwvmaPy0wqWJ-dSSYCigaktQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=666054c02fc6400283f2f38d3dee9f88&_e=RH4_zwEwTVIVcUfWTWbiBI0G8ZLWgveZJROpkj1mOY-bPccO-HE_kVUn9QF9Cw5EdO26N-wa1cH4xM2ixFlE7AxQ11acSPfMwBnFF04NuKFZyT4Xwmp4vaiqu8Iwp6I3_RODHIYyMfnoYo9RL82YtE8hINdXej8ycznZLOUL7tDtPJfVIwuIVWn1zYmGSoG5cEodkTF4wBUcFfs_5bhbBHYxqQc8j0nwCL2eEhy3BQRaRXdkFYAll-6mUVIJC9P1qZkDHy1XoHo3vuNv_1BIBPRcpfGsvIyCj8vjSbXoD-CGNJym_XqW-IAYIC2GMXE0RLWozxdVl8isdrjrGyUoauoYsw9X62aEezLxsfSyFhi5fmKWMM2sz29SPPBL5JkBqSEHaLAHUXVE6XBG2lZ0ig%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! clean_body: | | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have INDICTED me in a disgusting witch hunt. Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer. Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. Ever. From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement. Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement. The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first. But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Friend,

When Hillary Clinton and Obama committed campaign infractions, they only paid fines. Arresting President Trump is clearly an attack against him as the front runner of the Republican Party.

**But this is bigger than President Trump. The government gangsters are coming after America-First patriots, just like you. **

Their message is clear. _**If they can detain President Trump, they can do it to any one of us**_**.**

But I'm not going to wait for them to come after us. I'm taking the fight to them! My goal is to raise $38,000 in the next 48 hours to fund the legal battles for America-First patriots. Will you join me?

body:
This threat is very very real, Peter
|

| | | Peter,

**Republicans are SOUNDING THE ALARM on Communist China snatching up our farmland!**
Why should you care?
1. China has purchased enough farmland to DOUBLE the size of New York.
2. Remember when a Chinese spy balloon floated across the country? The farmland China is buying up is right next to classified military bases!
3. The Biden Administration is refusing to do ANYTHING about it.

_How would you feel if the town you live in started getting bought up by Communist China? What if your neighbor's house sold to a shady Chinese business? It's happening more and more... and we need to do something about it RIGHT NOW!_

Luckily, House Republicans refuse to let China keep buying up our farmland without consequence. We're holding hearings in the field, investigating their methods, and tracking every last purchase.

_**[We just need to know you're with us.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507380:6vRHv_GmN:m:1:3365131770:A940101A138F6BC69C2225F490C398FC:r "We just need to
know you're with us.")**_

A foreign adversary buying up our land threatens the national security of our great country.

**Republicans have made themselves crystal clear: The Communists shouldn't own ONE SQUARE INCH of our farmland from sea to shining sea! **

_**[If you agree, we IMPLORE YOU to go on record right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507380:6vRHv_GmN:m:1:3365131770:A940101A138F6BC69C2225F490C398FC:r "If you agree, we

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04549%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vmbv2fI%2f4rH68nG9%2bC%2b9ug&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2A5QuBAdPe5fPeFhDTywzQ&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04540%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2A5QuBAdPe5fPeFhDTywzQ&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Peter,

We hate to be **critical,** but this is too important.

Multiple influential Republicans have reached out because they know how important you are to our Party and mission to flip the Senate, but they haven't heard back.

_Can we count on you to put Republicans back in the majority? _

**[Watch Karl Rove's 2024 election RIGHT NOW to help Republicans FLIP the Senate and cement a HISTORIC majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508550:6Me9v_GNi:m:1:3331421248:08ABAF870E724DE3EBD5065FD8409E22:r)**

name: Team Miyares
subject: eroding our core principles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
This is opposite to everything America stands for. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=97b360578f854f3eb375e0667662e1b5&_t=7-rtVO1ip4GXcDKWq0bMclO1zdK_3QGh-pFfOv5Olu3DKQfxFXN_F1UZoYSnVObglhbsCxHUZ5_8dC_wMIWvlKhziS5_F3SwpY0Y6GWh7UE%3D)_.
---
Peter, All across America, and even here in Virginia, when far-left progressive prosecutors pick and choose which crimes to prosecute and which ones to ignore to advance their ideological and political agenda, our nation's core principles of equal justice under the law are eroded. When we see violent crime spiking across the nation in cities like New York, San Francisco, and Chicago, but their liberal district attorneys institute a blanket policy and refuse to prosecute certain crimes, they are showing small business owners, police officers, and families that keeping their citizens safe is not their priority. **That’s wrong.** It’s time to take a stand and tell these rogue, far-left progressive district attorneys that it's time to stand up for the victims, not push a divisive political agenda. As Attorney General, Jason’s top priority is finding ways to keep our kids, our neighborhoods, and our communities safe. Above all else, that must be our top priority, but too many of these radical district attorneys in places like New York and San Francisco are taking a criminals first, victims last approach and that has to stop. _**[Can we count on you to stand with Jason and help fight to keep our communities safe?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=97b360578f854f3eb375e0667662e1b5&_e=JOl0KsqyH-_m35GXTY7aQHizDKK3Nqo-50Yg_n_4xutDs_pYVSSCIP9JQp82hqBv0Af9veb83b7s1lhPou5adheF0rehVYAP9sNqHDb3Qw8OXgB5uoiWhvVpRbctNHzdLvG1l_4vlj7H8YnpkWmrNCeHxQKa9ixnRtf_BMekrMW1X4AZCfmHUWaoyReV-MpKaCua3SI8T4knG1nmQ8Y34LD_MD3oiTWIBKjG848EM27uWzPla8BVCdZ6p4CpkN70dsyTFme8ok-lotVNev-R-2f6RMDCaSA4mLFzj6vLbEAuWk5vIAmSRx5PTpbfueCRi7g2zcU28xTtV4hD6YJskIjDaJWLfFHEjpLSfOzQZYZRgi6MJeUpTICCv2O-UhB9 "Can we count on you to stand with Jason and help me fight to keep our communities safe?")**_ The billionaires and far-left dark money groups, who are funding the campaigns of these radical district attorneys, are already targeting Jason. They know that he won’t back down and will continue to fight their liberal soft on crime policies. We have a big fight ahead of us. For example, in 2022, _major crime increased by 36%, in New York City_ according to the NYPD, but their radical District Attorney Bragg instituted a blanket policy of not prosecuting some criminals. This is a tragedy for violent crime victims and is one of the reasons Americans are losing trust in the government. Liberal out of touch prosecutors are just wrong. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=64276936c7eb406ba4628d66404cb4af&_e=2F81sgIWaCbW9JLvB7yXs0B_yduo1el6rqSKUEQLVfh2hogxHoAmPRwujdkFD_Ay5IFO06ufqfOqhC4ubbh7JJOeClXMPNinOthvsKTii6Bvb5WrLl05rXlM3RMooyzztFBDOGHtnpOuVUoUdCZmac_M1SebLUIWWkQngsHmH01PInLhPyIl5a_bGvpBz_vs6jT0m8A7p2klfArpwJS9It6tBqJJYB8XYOjENdbsNtoFGIakyUyzAZ8oIPl_jbVKAAhcuX2sd4Yyz_xJWDPyxA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=64276936c7eb406ba4628d66404cb4af&_e=2F81sgIWaCbW9JLvB7yXs0B_yduo1el6rqSKUEQLVfh2hogxHoAmPRwujdkFD_Ay5IFO06ufqfOqhC4ubbh7JJOeClXMPNinOthvsKTii6Bvb5WrLl05rXlM3RMooyzzhUSeI75TTT7XJoR-RBzfUOWuf-rpSQE7tfGZiehfRAqJ9u2wPCTrn2wU0H23XyZeCBg7aOjnzhPlAPa48669KMoWUcKbeSfHNiTPD1TN82hvSC9qSJx_YmotAQTqSri8YB1xbwN-u1VdrBu8NfK3cQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=64276936c7eb406ba4628d66404cb4af&_e=2F81sgIWaCbW9JLvB7yXs0B_yduo1el6rqSKUEQLVfh2hogxHoAmPRwujdkFD_Ay5IFO06ufqfOqhC4ubbh7JJOeClXMPNinOthvsKTii6Bvb5WrLl05rXlM3RMooyzz70XogwjRSYMT1jiytqy4IpACl97CDQ7eai7jQO_ayxoF3bwiULl0x40tEnd73rVk9_M9ZhD-FP8iC6iq6Wr7u_UJCnpR1zpOJ0ntkcoaO6L4jHVcIkWAhmIgocGLIPzwZZS0n7ICCt9S9LZNXKfsWQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

| | **9 million children are food insecure in the United States.** For some students, school lunches are their _ONLY MEAL_ for the day. But right now, healthy plant-based options are scarce on many school lunch menus and some students report being left with _**nothing but an apple**_ due to limited options! Every child should have the right to choose healthy meals based on their personal diet. **Healthier foods reduce the risk of heart disease, cancer, and diabetes.** But many students are struggling to find healthy, culturally relevant options that meet their dietary needs. The U.S. Department of Agriculture is considering new nutrition standards that could increase healthy, plant-based options for our students, but **we’re falling short of our signature goal to help approve these healthy food standards!** **[Please, Friend, demand the USDA support healthy school meals and give children the nutrition they need to grow and learn by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702791?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702792?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Food production contributes to more than one-third of global greenhouse gas emissions.** Compared to meals that depend on meat coming from factory farms, plant-based meals produce significantly fewer emissions and are healthier for the planet. With more than _**7 BILLION**_ meals served annually in American schools, more plant-based meals would have a major impact to curb climate change.
Healthy school meal standards are about students’ futures. We all want students to succeed, but to do so they need healthy, sustainable meals that secure their ability to learn and fight for a safer planet. **There are just a FEW DAYS LEFT to give input to the USDA.** [**We need 34 more people from your area to take immediate action and secure healthier meals for students! Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702793?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702794?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friend,
_**Actions speak louder than words.**_
I'm headed to our southern border TOMORROW because SOMEONE needs to be a leader and prioritize the crisis occurring on our border.

President Biden and his administration have spent the past two years _**ignoring**_ this ongoing crisis. They've abandoned every American living in a border town and **every single state that 's now dealing with the consequences of this crisis. **

**[Watch my latest video on how our current administration has fueled a DISASTER on the southern border and how I plan to secure it.>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d344589d3b47e28e337878ba8f1106&_e=tQCu9QZeReTQQUxDuvKbqp9CA6gOMWHZXdyhk-Gf-TmPuW1pI1S5CxtQcxWgJzu4l_QNJLeqd0B9QFSS6TJynhaxbWR115GHXaM7HF-BMGEYhRMJmhjri1_k9V3ADdn_evASQoaWOjNmRyETsoHUEkDv6sZ9uj7XpruprQjreOdpQbecX3rkm1fgVi-HHWV4TDQkwtVP2EJlmlwk4htaHwYqPhUbal2plAwEu0AiVaS6PIxFuCt66MCPlj1qFaOV9-FW0EAf0HpV9RpPQDFxZaxSu4TYAe2NaIwVQMUn8ZpKyRX0dvuAUBL2LkVqsnk8M3RLkQ-E5v4O5FfaMm_cXym2ZXG0pp6l7dr29Oh3qF-2KTzorPjGzmF4zbtuzA0D "Watch my latest video on how our current administration has fueled a DISASTER on the southern border and how I plan to secure it. >>")**
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d344589d3b47e28e337878ba8f1106&_e=tQCu9QZeReTQQUxDuvKbqp9CA6gOMWHZXdyhk-Gf-TmPuW1pI1S5CxtQcxWgJzu4l_QNJLeqd0B9QFSS6TJynhaxbWR115GHXaM7HF-BMGEYhRMJmhjri1_k9V3ADdn_evASQoaWOjNmRyETsoHUEkDv6sZ9uj7XpruprQjreOdpQbecX3rkm1fgVi-HHWV4TDQkwtVP2EJlmlwk4htaH1fwRkpJ6IE6o6je8YsgQVayjdUo5YFwqmUJ_DRDa0wQXb_U6HExxkHni800mFJmzz3IxH5vMNIHluMBQ4cOx1kBDQEBfALAeBuFi6f6EV2jdKwXFah1_FjSCCsBAEH_HE0G-cwaElxbtnpdgPr74uODGYDYhv0woQIS2lj9yr0-)

Frankly, we've all heard the lies over and over again with the Biden administration claiming that _" the border is secure"_ - when all the numbers prove otherwise...

---
| | [JUST TAKE A LOOK->](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d344589d3b47e28e337878ba8f1106&_e=tQCu9QZeReTQQUxDuvKbqp9CA6gOMWHZXdyhk-Gf-TmPuW1pI1S5CxtQcxWgJzu4l_QNJLeqd0B9QFSS6TJynhaxbWR115GHXaM7HF-BMGEYhRMJmhjri1_k9V3ADdn_evASQoaWOjNmRyETsoHUEkDv6sZ9uj7XpruprQjreOdpQbecX3rkm1fgVi-HHWV4TDQkwtVP2EJlmlwk4htaH2P7LETcWXmnv7o5uwTVa-I9XuzKtB01aBvn2ea9NcHsoT1mSng3qyn8wAfqcbCi6N6taaBsOXy18n1FHq-n3Mz5w3vu4W97tC5hFA-Rxd7ejqHPqyfOExoZ8vl1RpjUguZYQuWwl9xynrM-8yV1gJWuEcuYOud_LqwJ2DNuygN5)
---
I want every American to understand my dedication to creating a safe and secure border, even further I want them to know EXACTLY how I plan to do that when I'm in office. I pledge to YOU that I'll start off with these actionable items:
* Recruit and hire new Border Patrol and ICE workers to stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants
* Restart Remain in Mexico and keep Title 42, while ENDING catch and release once and for all
* Institute a national E-Verify program just like I did as governor of South Carolina
* End taxpayer-funded handouts to illegal immigrants and sanctuary cities

None of this can be accomplished with Joe Biden and the Left. I need your help to tackle our border crisis from every angle. **[Will you chip in just $15 today to help me create a safer future for us ALL?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d344589d3b47e28e337878ba8f1106&_e=tQCu9QZeReTQQUxDuvKbqp9CA6gOMWHZXdyhk-Gf-TmPuW1pI1S5CxtQcxWgJzu4l_QNJLeqd0B9QFSS6TJynhaxbWR115GHXaM7HF-BMGEYhRMJmhjri1_k9V3ADdn_evASQoaWOjNmRyETsoHUEkDv6sZ9uj7XpruprQjreOdpQbecX3rkm1fgVi-HHWV4TDQkwtVP2EJlmlwk4htaH3v5Cm_kBhGJZjyx2VsUEsJ0ZSFJOgku0iGygr8g4bXx74N7qYVSZmai00E_UEPdwzOnODSYZShXSMIpSkKTwmP3WLo9M9KG046YEf2PoazL57-vM9TKzpzhHz4x-rdaWV-u4ddQPBvgiMJsm9OQIL_5nqI9e0DE3Zoa8xCvtHXP "Will you chip in just $15 today to help me create a safer future for us ALL?")**

Thank you in advance for your support. We need to ensure everyone sees this video to know what's at stake. **[Join me in sharing this video with 5 friends today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d344589d3b47e28e337878ba8f1106&_e=tQCu9QZeReTQQUxDuvKbqp9CA6gOMWHZXdyhk-Gf-TmPuW1pI1S5CxtQcxWgJzu4l_QNJLeqd0B9QFSS6TJynhaxbWR115GHXaM7HF-BMGEYhRMJmhjri1_k9V3ADdn_evASQoaWOjNmRyETsoHUEkDv6sZ9uj7XpruprQjreOdpQbecX3rkm1fgVi-HHWV4TDQkwtVP2EJlmlwk4htaHyy7LM1Y0oDUeSxUcKCHnuuV2xGZvPP0wT9u2NOmt-MMqXX6teehqW-jXT_jVFmo4cVaFDHws1B0sL9VOGo9dyqLjOI4iUsRm-dbjkqlG2r12LcvFPCfFlj2X3Ce9Hy5ZtwrD7V_IEI8AtKpHVSZeN-jcAurX7_lUvDAT8qA0OlU "Join me in sharing this video with 5 friends today.")**

President Biden and his administration have spent the past two years ignoring this ongoing crisis. I need your help to tackle our border crisis from every angle. "Will you chip in just $15 today to help me create a safer future for us ALL?" Thank you in advance for your support.
