name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=532249ef760545389b0e3532fe63b5af&_e=Edbpr0jv3m-6GStfWggYm69dyz2oYgBGD60boRxnAmyTQFrLHVsxCHV1UguggqY4uKrvrGZ2TJ8F-L3NB87iwZKfxhBStWKl88OOZTMzhE5z49RglSD4zfil_nda3nM7iTsR-AB4Vz_2Bt466qex2w-sxIKce9elllGcEJwA_7aStpnzgBwLYNNWOjldHBcjn3pKjq96Dq_Sn_8LNN8Q9jPD8jrbDaBbbiuoH1PCGiYEix3BFOKmAzFEjFl1NZmkwl83Ew3aq8CBC9tnvRGaYA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Let’s Put God First
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507464:6j5xd_GQN:m:1:3365131770:93B39019B3D02EF25A7A115B61CB1A28:r)
---

Despite the huge victories during the recent elections, we cannot just stop working on the things that really matter.

_**Our nation must renew its commitment to faith.**_

This nation was founded on Judeo-Christian principles and by God-fearing leaders. They knew that when we put God first, America prospers.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507464:6j5xd_GQN:m:1:3365131770:93B39019B3D02EF25A7A115B61CB1A28:r)
---

Today, our nation is at a crossroads. We can continue down the path of amoral materialism and transactional politics, or we can restore the faith-based leadership our founders championed.

**I want to be clear: faith -_and faith alone_ \- can bring America to salvation. **

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507464:6j5xd_GQN:m:1:3365131770:93B39019B3D02EF25A7A115B61CB1A28:r)
---

If you agree, _**[please consider making a donation today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507464:6j5xd_GQN:m:1:3365131770:93B39019B3D02EF25A7A115B61CB1A28:r "please consider making a donation today")**_ to help restore faith-driven leadership to our nation.

I believe that if our leaders at the local, state, and federal levels were motivated by their devotion to God and their love of country, that America will rise to new heights.

The vision of the founders can still be restored.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507464:6j5xd_GQN:m:1:3365131770:93B39019B3D02EF25A7A115B61CB1A28:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")

Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker.

If you share my concerns about China's threat to America, make a donation to help support tough conservatives who will never give an inch to the CCP.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI put spy inside disabled Marine’s legal defense team
body:
One of the witnesses for Zach's defense is an FBI snitch -- a Confidential Human Source (CHS) who's been spying on Zach and Zach's lawyer since April, 2021 and informing the FBI and DOJ on how Zach was going to defend himself in court. | | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)
---
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)Dear Peter,

[ **Please give a critical donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)

Late last year, I wrote you about January 6 peaceful protester and disabled Marine Zach Rehl.

(I've included that urgent email below this one, because it has vital information about Zach, his family, and his case.)

I'm writing you about Zach right now, because shocking information just came out in court on March 22:

**One of the witnesses for Zach 's defense is an FBI snitch -- a Confidential Human Source (CHS) who's been spying on Zach and Zach's lawyer since April, 2021 and informing the FBI and DOJ on how Zach was going to defend himself in court. **

Joe Biden's criminally rotten Department of Justice kept this a secret until March 22.

Investigative reporter Julie Kelly broke this critically important story.

**Zach 's attorney has filed a motion to compel the FBI to reveal ALL information they have from their snitch, and from any other snitches that may still be spying on Zach and his lawyer. **

Here's a direct quote from that legal motion:

"During this period of time, the CHS has been in contact via telephone, text messaging, and other electronic means, with one or more of the counsel for the defense and at least one defendant.

During this time, the CHS also participated in prayer meetings with members of one or more of the defendants' families.

The CHS also engaged in discussions with one of the defendant's family members about replacing one of the defense counsel."

I couldn't be more disgusted with my former alma mater, the Department of Justice.

**It 's clear that Joe Biden's lawless "Gestapo" of a DOJ and "Waffen SS" attack dog FBI won't let the Constitution or the rule of law stand in their way as they use the federal courts in Washington, D.C. to prosecute and persecute the January 6 peaceful protesters. **

And if they get away with it, they will come for you, me, our families, and other patriotic Americans, too!

**But there 's something you can do about it.**

As you know, I'm fighting back peacefully and legally for the January 6 patriots.

I've filed lawsuits against Attorney General Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher Wray, both criminals of our corrupt government justice system.

And I'm taking other hard-hitting legal actions to protect our fellow Americans and other endangered rights and liberties.

[**PLEASE help me fully fund these critical fights with your very best gift immediately.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)

**Very few lawyers are fighting for January 6 peaceful protesters. Some of them have even folded under the intense pressure, and pushed their clients to plead guilty to crimes they didn 't commit. **

But I will FIGHT BACK peacefully and legally, with your vital support.

[ **I beg you to help me defend these abused Americans with your crucial gift right now.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. The FBI planted a snitch inside the legal defense team of disabled Marine Zach Rehl. His right to a solid defense is now in danger.**

[ **Please help me fight back peacefully and legally for all January 6 peaceful protesters with your best gift right now.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508557:Jfksh_GNz:m:1:3331421248:3F85D40EBADDC5B8A2F2DC550145095C:r)

**My previous urgent email about Zach from last October:**

Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.**

Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, for pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen** .

But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's corrupt and criminal Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

What's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.

**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted! **

As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters.

No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email. **

If the FBI can push around a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**[That’s the average gift that my campaign receives from grassroots donors like Seléna P. and Marcus W. over email, and that’s the amount I’m about to ask you to donate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61157636/399276319/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1027-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk3OGZmNy01NmQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCTawfj_5hUSWq8w5P9cZmOX3LGuisyv1rym32rgxtg=)****Here’s why:**

After generations of politicians catering almost exclusively to the powerful and corrupt, my fight for progress, justice, and accountability was a cold shock to the most powerful forces in our nation – **and now, they're attempting to undermine me at _every_ turn.**
Peter, the powerful and corrupt failed to kick me out of office and replace me with my far-right opponent last November, but that doesn't mean their attacks have stopped. And, with reproductive rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more hanging in the balance, I'm relying on this team _more than ever_ to join my fight for progress so I can continue to fight for what's right with everything I have.
**That's why I'm counting _you_****to help keep my fight for progress fueled during this critical moment for our nation. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=DaSuJwgF9LLq1usOYml_LtrZ62Q%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=y6wGpABv7khnr5X5F_Fot1gtclc%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=qZ1Qnl-OagmN1kkRz-p8l4bLAr0%3D) Business Insider
---

---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6429b5399e7cc27fed400629%26ss_email_id%3D6429b915ae54430ed112075e%26ss_campaign_name%3DPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%2BSinging%2BEvent%252C%2BToday%2BAll%2BDay%2B8am-8pm%252C%2BMore%2BDates%2BToo%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-02T17%253A19%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=R46qwHdi73u6NygqQjeH_kmYBZY%3D)
---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
There will be petitions available at this event at the Palmer Train Depot
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6429b5399e7cc27fed400629%26ss_email_id%3D6429b915ae54430ed112075e%26ss_campaign_name%3DPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%2BSinging%2BEvent%252C%2BToday%2BAll%2BDay%2B8am-8pm%252C%2BMore%2BDates%2BToo%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-02T17%253A19%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=NyBb54Pku0Iz4r9In--qh2e-fG4%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6429b915ae54430ed112075e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6429b5399e7cc27fed400629&l=en-US&s=43IE7hQWLVKDUinDUKIKuXF-G_E%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

He may even be handcuffed. The former president is expected to walk through the routine steps of felony arrest processing in New York. " I am not afraid of what 's to come. This is the battle I willingly signed up for when I decided to take on the entire Washington Machine as a political outsider 8 years ago, and be YOUR voice. Nothing worthwhile in life ever comes easily. And I can think of nothing more worthwhile than the noble mission to SAVE AMERICA. | Thank you, | Donald J. | Peter, I want you to know that I just spoke with President Trump last night in the wake of bombshell news that the never-ending Witch Hunt against him has now led to an **INDICTMENT.**

_Here was his concern: we have just woken up today in a completely different country than the one we once knew._

This politically-motivated indictment - this SOROS-IFICATION of our justice system - has transformed the United States of America into a third-world dystopia before our very eyes.

_**Dictators and despots now find it easier to _jail their political rivals_ than compete against them in free and fair elections!**_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This critical race—for the deciding Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin—will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians. Your help is urgently needed.
body:
Election on Tuesday!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T282abaa3-54eb-4ce3-8ea4-efd89f6b0832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important race of the year begins in less than 48 hours._** _**A race--for the deciding Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin--that will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians.**_ **_A race that may decide whether criminally indicted, twice-impeached traitor, Donald Trump, can lose the popular vote a third time but just steal the electoral votes he needs to overturn our democracy, like he attempted in 2020._** [**_Right-wing nut Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020, and as his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T575581e7-ea91-4bd2-9b65-af0ac6f27d93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If there are lingering questions as to whether the Wisconsin Republican Party and their Supreme Court Judge candidate, right-wing bigot Dan Kelly, possess the slightest bit of decency, the question has been answered. _
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6571192-0ba1-44bb-8f29-8a808f6daff4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Trump Alert (via GA Dems)
subject: Trump was just INDICTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
that’s a big problem for Democrats

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61166709/399299420/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzJhN2NjNC01ZmQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNI12gEzFrB2xqwB1mxzo-iY2lRx9B4nI5YRHcu73gc=&emci=6e751145-00d0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=472a7cc4-5fd1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Donald Trump was just indicted late last week, and a lot of Americans were relieved to see some accountability. **_But here in Georgia, we’re worried._**

Donald Trump’s indictment is uncharted territory, and there’s no telling what’s to come from it. Will we hold a former President culpable for the crimes he committed? We don’t know.

Here’s what we do know: **_Donald Trump just became more powerful._**

Trump just united the Republican Party behind him. Republicans from every wing of the party have rushed to support Trump and condemn the indictment.

Not only that – **Trump just got handed thousands of hours of free air time for his trial.**

[**_We can’t let Trump use this indictment to become even more powerful. subject: Will you PLEASE add your name and personally endorse Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate?

name: Priority GOP Communication (From House GOP)
subject: Urgent News Regarding President Trump’s Indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a MUST READ...
|
---
| | | The news of President Donald J. Trump's INDICTMENT has the Radical Left celebrating from the rooftops.

This entire investigation is NOT about finding the truth and it's certainly NOT about justice...

**It 's about political intimidation. **

_**[They want to shut you up so they can keep destroying everything that makes our country great. Are you going to let them? If you're not afraid of standing up to the Radical Left, this might be your last chance to act before Trump is taken into custody.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507527:JIZ5W_G7N:m:1:3365131770:6F9C923AC193D4A54064DA00A91A8E6E:r "They want to shut you up so they can keep destroying everything that makes our country great. Are you going to
let them? If you’re not afraid of standing up to the Radical Left, this might be your last chance to act before Trump is taken into
custody.")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH US](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507527:JIZ5W_G7N:m:1:3365131770:6F9C923AC193D4A54064DA00A91A8E6E:r "STAND
WITH US")
---
The Radical Left wants to silence all of us, and they're crowing about putting Trump away and stopping him from running for President...

_Just look at what Liberals are saying (warning: these comments will make you want to pull your hair out!!!!): _
* **" Declare it a national holiday,"** Ana-Navarro Cardenas, co-host of "The View."
* **" My only request is that the arrest and perp walk be televised,"** Anti-Trump social media personality Mike Sington.
* **" Arrest Trump like any other criminal. No special treatment. Put him in handcuffs on camera. Make him do a perp walk in front of the entire world,"** Scott Dworkin, Progressive activist and co-founder of the Democratic Coalition.

It's not enough for them to indict President Trump after a corrupt politically motivated investigation... **NO! They 're calling for a public, humiliating stunt so everyone in America gets the message: _If you mess with the Radical Left, this is what you 'll get!_**

_**[We're desperately searching America for Patriots with enough grit and determination to stand up to the Radical Left alongside us.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507527:JIZ5W_G7N:m:1:3365131770:6F9C923AC193D4A54064DA00A91A8E6E:r "We’re desperately searching
America for Patriots with enough grit and determination to stand up to the Radical Left alongside us.")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH US](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507527:JIZ5W_G7N:m:1:3365131770:6F9C923AC193D4A54064DA00A91A8E6E:r "STAND
WITH US")
---
We know not everyone is up for this... It can take a lot of courage to stand up for Conservative principles these days, especially with the Radical Left threatening to make President Trump a political prisoner.

**But we think you 've got guts so that's why we're reaching out to you now. **

We'll wrap this up because time is of the essence. We really need you to decide right away:

_**[Will you stand with us? Please let us know before it's too late!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62507527:JIZ5W_G7N:m:1:3365131770:6F9C923AC193D4A54064DA00A91A8E6E:r "Will you stand with us? Please
let us know before it’s too late!")**_

Thank you,

House GOP

---

If we don’t take IMMEDIATE action to stop them, we can kiss any chance we have of saving the Senate goodbye... **_along with ALL of our Democratic progress!_**

name: Sam Cornale (via Democrats.org)
subject: A giant THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We had a huge first quarter of the year. And that is in no small part because of grassroots donors. | |
---
Derek, I am so proud of this team. We had a huge first quarter this year. And that is in no small part because of grassroots donors, who are the true backbone of our party. **Over 240,000 people stepped up and donated through emails and texts (just like the one you’re reading right now!) from the DNC last quarter, helping our party reach its grassroots fundraising goal.** Believe me when I say that _every single one of those donations is powerful_ \-- in fact, about two-thirds of the DNC’s funding comes from grassroots contributions. I probably sound like a broken record, but donations of $7 will make a world of difference in preparing Democrats for elections. **So, I have to ask:** **[Will you consider making a $7 contribution to the DNC today to start the second quarter of the year strong? Whatever you’re able to give will immediately be put to work supporting on-the-ground organizing, voter protection efforts, and more that will help elect Democrats this year and next.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUD71pFwOcoTMmoY7V15aOlxnKmS5Y-7I-2GSOAj9xaIPVaqbi1yu4w07C5Be2Kc0BwC70IJ5-5QMbCVOTqTyiy0sZdAz2KZHq0ing9sMPwvFHWPqYCQUiMD4i0Fw2MUGVIdkBMpqtaHMSNrfvxLhDcf-GxbnP-oXxFwoq-GgISMaxAfFDDFo4MXxxicwS46igkX890chgiPGjtz-K01A8qGUGN5-szrMtdGkHTEAGwFnWla0n6MC6yyKkBgubHsyS9lDFgK3iClF2CmkED9ph8e9LiJZ9OO5s0obXVvr5X5nsmHTnyEhx2ag8nNWH7S_QkSJGmDBPS_StDI7OiHA_ZmJ3S_nNzH09S7p8di85Z4/3v0/YFEvDwnGTxqBKpNWBExLOw/h0/pD12uTR9Rc9JWBtcaI9h-bTJL3Se2RzuCfHTHiI6MEc)**

That’s why I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will help us strengthen our party and elect Democrats nationwide. We are strong and getting stronger, but lasting political power means we have to keep building up our party infrastructure every single day. There are quite literally no off years, Derek. clean_body: We had a huge first quarter of the year. And that is in no small part because of grassroots donors. | | Derek, I am so proud of this team. We had a huge first quarter this year. And that is in no small part because of grassroots donors, who are the true backbone of our party. Over 240,000 people stepped up and donated through emails and texts (just like the one you’re reading right now!) from the DNC last quarter, helping our party reach its grassroots fundraising goal. Believe me when I say that every single one of those donations is powerful \-- in fact, about two-thirds of the DNC’s funding comes from grassroots contributions. I probably sound like a broken record, but donations of $7 will make a world of difference in preparing Democrats for elections. So, I have to ask: I could go on and on, but I just want you to know: I’m grateful for you. The Biden-Harris team has made incredible progress over the past two years, and we’re off to a roaring start laying the foundation for elections to come this year and next. That’s why I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will help us strengthen our party and elect Democrats nationwide. We are strong and getting stronger, but lasting political power means we have to keep building up our party infrastructure every single day. There are quite literally no off years, Derek. So, I have to ask: Thank you, Sam Sam Cornale Executive Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Protect Public Interest in Wildlife
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61169295/399309760/-1365267021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MzA0ZTBkLTY3ZDEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7vHexOzLz12Jc1Xw-5g4m0o4ttFOSgjEC1tFvp2DIh4=&emci=40bbe4a7-ead0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09304e0d-67d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, It’s Sunday, but we have a new Major Threat, HB 3086, that could be moving tomorrow. This bill would change how appointments to the Fish and Wildlife Commission are made, getting rid of proportional representation. **It’s a bad bill for our democracy and our wildlife, and it’s scheduled for a vote in the House committee on Monday at 5:30pm.[Will you write to your state representative today asking them to oppose HB 3086?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61169296/399309761/-1365267021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MzA0ZTBkLTY3ZDEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7vHexOzLz12Jc1Xw-5g4m0o4ttFOSgjEC1tFvp2DIh4=&emci=40bbe4a7-ead0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09304e0d-67d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** The Oregon Department of Fish and Wildlife (ODFW) works to “protect and enhance Oregon’s fish and wildlife and their habitats for use and enjoyment by present and future generations.” The purpose of the Fish and Wildlife Commission is to represent all of our interests while overseeing ODFW. Currently, commissioners are selected based on congressional districts. This selection model ensures everyone’s interests are represented when executing the mission of ODFW. **Major Threat HB 3086 proposes to shift away from this model, silencing many communities in our state.** If passed, this bill would create a Fish and Wildlife Commission based on geography (specifically river basin management areas), not population. **It would overrepresent some people and potentially erase others.** How would ODFW properly work towards its mission if those who oversee it do not represent Oregon’s diverse people and interests? If we care about our land, wildlife, and how they are managed and enjoyed, we need all backgrounds, experiences, and values to be represented on the Commission watching over ODFW’s important work. [**Please help us stop this bill as written and urge your state representative to support the -3 amendment for HB 3086 now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61169297/399309762/-1365267021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MzA0ZTBkLTY3ZDEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7vHexOzLz12Jc1Xw-5g4m0o4ttFOSgjEC1tFvp2DIh4=&emci=40bbe4a7-ead0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09304e0d-67d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Sincerely, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

Peter, I’m deeply humbled. Once again, our team of supporters has gone above and beyond. You helped us hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I can’t thank you enough for your generosity. Peter, as we head into the spring and summer, it’ll be crucial that we have the financial resources to meet this critical political moment. **The stakes are clearer than ever: If Republicans take control over our state in the next elections, they will take us backward. They will make our communities less safe. They will undo the progress that we’ve made.** _My focus is on ensuring that they do not have that chance._ I’ll be supporting Democratic candidates we can count on — and I’m committed to flipping NC blue for the first presidential election since 2008. We can do it, but we have to lay the groundwork now. **[Our grassroots donors make everything we do possible. I can’t thank you enough for your generosity. Peter, as we head into the spring and summer, it’ll be crucial that we have the financial resources to meet this critical political moment. The stakes are clearer than ever: If Republicans take control over our state in the next elections, they will take us backward. They will make our communities less safe. They will undo the progress that we’ve made. My focus is on ensuring that they do not have that chance. I’ll be supporting Democratic candidates we can count on — and I’m committed to flipping NC blue for the first presidential election since 2008. name: Sen. Amy Klobuchar
subject: Friend, no one expected me to run for elected office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[_My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me keep going._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61179670/399337376/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4029-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzU2Mjc0Ny04OWQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCTtgwcyuqh2RJXT0ts2aEkRkpwjrtCUpqZo9ybafQY=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61179671/399337377/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4029-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzU2Mjc0Ny04OWQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCTtgwcyuqh2RJXT0ts2aEkRkpwjrtCUpqZo9ybafQY=)
Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61179673/399337378/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4029-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzU2Mjc0Ny04OWQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCTtgwcyuqh2RJXT0ts2aEkRkpwjrtCUpqZo9ybafQY=)
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.___That’s the American dream in action._**

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:

**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families.**

clean_body: | | | Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. = = Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either. = But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota._That’s the American dream in action. Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know: I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families. = = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Amy Klobuchar and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much -- this team has never let me down. \-- Amy | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18921?t=1001&akid=3106%2E346206%2ETf070I ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230402-3106-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3106_346206_Tf070I&akid=3106%2E346206%2ETf070I

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3106%2E346206%2ETf070I

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

clean_body: “A Republic, if you can keep it.” | | | Patriot, November 5, 2024 will no longer just be an Election Day. It will be our Vindication Day. When we win, it will be a vindication for our movement – but also a vindication for America. We will prove that America still is a nation of, for, and by the people. We will prove that no matter how much the Deep State tries to manipulate and interfere in our elections, voters like YOU still get to decide our nation’s future. Our Founding Fathers called America “a Republic, if you can keep it.” And on November 5, 2024, WE WILL KEEP IT! | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I just spoke with President Trump...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508282:J9cKJ_GNZ:m:1:3365131770:4C83F79064E7A008D7BAA235FDA50346:r)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I want you to know that I just spoke with President Trump last night in the wake of bombshell news that the never-ending Witch Hunt against him has now led to an **INDICTMENT.**

_Here was his concern: we have just woken up today in a completely different country than the one we once knew._

This politically-motivated indictment - this SOROS-IFICATION of our justice system - has transformed the United States of America into a third-world dystopia before our very eyes.

_**Dictators and despots now find it easier to _jail their political rivals_ than compete against them in free and fair elections!**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508282:J9cKJ_GNZ:m:1:3365131770:4C83F79064E7A008D7BAA235FDA50346:r)
---
| It's clear why this dark day for America has sadly become a reality: President Donald J. Trump always fought for us. He puts the American People above corrupt interests. And for that reason alone, the powerful will NEVER stop coming after him.

**So I will continue to stand with President Trump - because I know that he has always stood with us. **

[**Will you help me continue to be one of 45 's strongest defenders in the wake of this POLITICAL PERSECUTION?? He needs his top allies to be with him now more than EVER BEFORE!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508282:J9cKJ_GNZ:m:1:3365131770:4C83F79064E7A008D7BAA235FDA50346:r)

| When he wasn't letting felons and murderers out on the streets, D.A. Alvin Bragg openly spoke about going after President Trump.

George Soros shelled out A MILLION DOLLARS to get this rogue prosecutor elected.

And now, he has just carried out the Regime's bidding with this Grand Jury Indictment based on sham legal charges!

By nearly a 2-to-1 margin, the American People see this stunt for what it is...

...a politically motivated WITCH HUNT.

[**So I need your help making sure that our voice - the voice of the Silent Majority - is not drowned out by these corrupt actors who are trying to JAIL the leader of our movement! Join Me - Help Me Defend President Trump!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508282:J9cKJ_GNZ:m:1:3365131770:4C83F79064E7A008D7BAA235FDA50346:r)

Thanks for not backing down,

From each and every one of us at the Fairness Project, thank you so much for powering this team’s critical work. So many issues and personal freedoms are at stake right now across the country — health care access, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and so much more —ALL areas where we can _and have_ used ballot measure campaigns to pass the progressive policies working people need. It’s not lost on us that supporters like you, friend, are who make this very work possible. clean_body: | | Friend — thanks to you, we were able to hit our $10,000 goal and finish Q1 of 2023 stronger than ever. From each and every one of us at the Fairness Project, thank you so much for powering this team’s critical work. So many issues and personal freedoms are at stake right now across the country — health care access, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and so much more —ALL areas where we can and have used ballot measure campaigns to pass the progressive policies working people need. It’s not lost on us that supporters like you, friend, are who make this very work possible. So, as we close out Q1 of the new year and start planning for the cycle ahead, we want to know what issue areas are most important to you. Thanks for your continued support, team! name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Democracy is on the ballot this year, in 2023 – not just in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
From abortion and reproductive rights to voting fairness, American life as we know it is at stake in every state judicial election.
|
---

Team,

You don’t need me to tell you how important next year’s elections will be. But the truth is that in states across the country, democracy is on the ballot this year, in 2023, not just in 2024. **That’s because American life as we have come to define it is at stake in every state judicial election.** Too many extremist judges are determined to remake America in a way that is inconsistent with the desires of the nation’s people.

[**_I’m asking for your continued support for the NDRC’s efforts to elect fair-minded leaders, and for all of our work. Can I count on you to make a donation of any amount?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61171671/399318795/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230402_FR_2O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMDcwZDZhLTZmZDEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-R1A2l09rUZ7kX23sh8XWRtToaRcMdIXB4SoIo36HpM=)

In just a matter of days, Wisconsin holds a critically important election for the state’s highest court, and right-wing activists are spending millions to help elect their preferred judge. To get an idea of what Republicans are hoping to accomplish through the courts, we only need to look at what politicians are doing in North Carolina.

Last year at North Carolina’s state supreme court, our affiliate won a huge victory for fair maps and voting rights. But now Republican politicians are asking to overturn that ruling – even though the _only_ thing that has changed is the makeup of the justices on the court.

**By attempting to fill state supreme court benches with hard right ideologues, Republicans are going down a dangerous path that could challenge the independence of our courts, reduce the public’s faith in them, and weaken our system of checks and balances. From reproductive freedom to voting fairness, everything we value is on the line.

Team, supporters like you have always been critical to the NDRC’s work. Will you donate to help us continue fighting for a strong democracy?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: From abortion and reproductive rights to voting fairness, American life as we know it is at stake in every state judicial election. | Team, You don’t need me to tell you how important next year’s elections will be. But the truth is that in states across the country, democracy is on the ballot this year, in 2023, not just in 2024. That’s because American life as we have come to define it is at stake in every state judicial election. Too many extremist judges are determined to remake America in a way that is inconsistent with the desires of the nation’s people. = In just a matter of days, Wisconsin holds a critically important election for the state’s highest court, and right-wing activists are spending millions to help elect their preferred judge. To get an idea of what Republicans are hoping to accomplish through the courts, we only need to look at what politicians are doing in North Carolina. Last year at North Carolina’s state supreme court, our affiliate won a huge victory for fair maps and voting rights. But now Republican politicians are asking to overturn that ruling – even though the only thing that has changed is the makeup of the justices on the court. By attempting to fill state supreme court benches with hard right ideologues, Republicans are going down a dangerous path that could challenge the independence of our courts, reduce the public’s faith in them, and weaken our system of checks and balances. From reproductive freedom to voting fairness, everything we value is on the line. Team, supporters like you have always been critical to the NDRC’s work. Will you donate to help us continue fighting for a strong democracy? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I can’t thank you enough for making the NDRC’s work possible. – Eric H. Holder, Jr. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | | Florida Governor Ron DeSantis [has ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T521255c7-2a62-4fe4-8052-06949ad0c897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[announced](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dc20e8e-71b1-4406-be05-38922a731ba9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that he will refuse to extradite Donald Trump to New York to face criminal charges and punishment -- even though the [Constitution ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f63ad5d-b456-4b1a-a7d2-a6a1fe92d69a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[requires](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbba83a26-c91e-4993-be1f-32aec5867e8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ it](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf532e34d-2732-4663-91ad-e2b4e19d1823/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).

[**If DeSantis does this, he should be arrested and face charges himself.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b3329ad-a30a-492c-a70c-913a505d2680/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

It's one thing for him to defend Trump, or disagree with charges. But offering Trump asylum from punishment for crimes committed in plain site is quite another. And there is no way DeSantis can be permitted to defy the Constitution itself in this manner.

[**Add your name: Arrest Ron DeSantis if He Won't Extradite Trump**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbce76211-7a2e-4fa7-9c46-59f01517b1f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - Note, Trump reportedly will show for the initial arraignment in NY, but that is just the first of many steps, so don't let up on DeSantis, and speak out against this unconstitutional threat!]_ _[P. body:
#
Friends —
This Tuesday, April 4, Wisconsin will elect a 7th Justice to its Supreme Court which will determine the future of many democratic freedoms in the state and around the country. It is no understatement to say that this is the most important election of the year.
Trusted pro-democracy candidate, Judge Janet, faces MAGA-endorsed right-wing candidate, Dan Kelly, who is a direct threat to abortion access and voting rights in Wisconsin. He even participated in a plan to overturn the 2020 election with fake electors.
Dan Kelly is not someone we want anywhere near the Wisconsin Supreme Court or our democracy.
But as right-wing MAGA millionaires dump cash in attack ads against Judge Janet, it is crucial that she has the support she needs to not only combat those GOP-sponsored attack ads but to get out the vote, and win on April 4th.
With just 2 days until the election, she is counting on our support.
[**Will you rush a $10 contribution between Judge Janet Protasiewicz and The Long Run to help support her and protect Wisconsin in this final stretch before election day?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230402-1-t2&t=1&akid=4322%2E196590%2EWorjNl)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts [CLICK TO LISTEN]
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508607:JfTUf_G7N:m:1:3331421248:775D4A5766DD036BAF355EAC906B99A1:r)

Peter,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508607:JfTUf_G7N:m:1:3331421248:775D4A5766DD036BAF355EAC906B99A1:r)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508607:JfTUf_G7N:m:1:3331421248:775D4A5766DD036BAF355EAC906B99A1:r)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

clean_body: Peter, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? body:
| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9lfDnOXnfkkcD6bl3aN_pZq6Wo3sAS--fP6vPElOvZElPXWQdRhkqa_YaYtPDMXY0KuEUNzjqFUqk7ztbLEFAybTXO1jYAa9IJHjVqFztyVnS4WUXa6QgXzprsPDwpA198vqaADgCKixz_6N0KC0_6GSi14OAI7mgEjmMqOscpgxxgFr91PFH6w1-HRd7AkMUQ%3D%3D)
---
| | **Taking Major Steps to Combat Antisemitism**
---
---
---
Attorney General Jason Miyares has returned from co-leading a bipartisan delegation of eight attorneys general from across America on a trip to Israel and Poland to learn about Israel’s world-class technology for public safety and security, and to learn more about the best ways states can combat antisemitism.
---
---
**_Attorney General Miyares with trip co-chair, North Carolina Attorney General Stein (D)._**
---
| | **Remembering Lives Lost at Auschwitz**
---
---
| |
---
**Prior to Israel, the delegation visited[Auschwitz](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9srABQcAfehfbs922y_SbJmemr3OLYeutaeapFcNzCALfLj0d717HqNsts-oEF9II6VcGvo4K2owCIymJQn1UwsCPH3exjwpARHEXAgGVinc8xutRur3jO-kelkCc2ELZxv4TpABtTOeUNYiRLN-M-mtYyCc3C3pbzG_T-zc5D3dc-t_GjJVCKmwi76RUfnwtQ%3D%3D) concentration camp in Poland. **
---
**Learning from the Experts**
---
---
| | The delegation gained lots of knowledge from Mr. Michael Berenbaum, the foremost Holocaust scholar in the United States. Mr. Berenbaum discussed the historical rise of antisemitism in the 1930s and 40s, and particularly how it was able to fester in progressive European cities.
---
---
| | _**Attorney General Miyares pictured **__**with Mr. Michael Berebaum.**_
---
| | **Israeli Ministry of Foreign Affairs**
---
---
---
**In Israel, the delegation met with experts on global antisemitism from the Israeli Ministry of Foreign Affairs. ** **Specifically, the attorneys general addressed the alarmingly high – and constant – rates of antisemitism in America and the issue of boycott divestiture and sanctions (‘BDS’). ** **_Virginia’s newfound relationship with Israel’s Ministry Foreign Affairs experts will greatly help the Commonwealth’s Antisemitism Task Force. _**
---
| |
---
**Attorney General Miyares speaking ** **with Israeli President Isaac Herzog. ** _“As attorneys general, it was beneficial for [the delegation] to learn from Israeli security officials about the nation’s world-class security technology and defense capabilities. Very few nations face the amount of threats that Israel does, and yet they’re able to successfully keep their citizens safe.” _ **–Attorney General Miyares **
---
**Hall of Remembrance**
---
---
---
---
**Attorney General Miyares was honored to lay a wreath in the**[**Hall of Remembrance**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9mjg3JTpOwwG9yyCJCOnfIzCk2dVovX6bTvHJiYi5NU4-EJT_XzkFC0pfDuAJU3Xt2vtTOXVGFz2kYeIfpWKycOCCwYPkIubumLuaYM6S3J7wAZA1j3ktiHuDWyUs96qDLojCVKE04aWcaqpZhREHoofakWxTulvw2COXL3V19AGgWH6qYBtOxqzRuI5yUbPE0Mf4Ky3sRFSxjlrcZX9VbUoOizyCmo48IOiCuutEE0HXo7kWLELbfADTt1WzyOv2Q%3D%3D)**at**[**Yad Vashem**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9mjg3JTpOwwG9yyCJCOnfIwRUA2P5d7I6wQQfZqmvoL0AXFDg6YuldW19ITyW23ocMJX5geMJSoYoPwSWogAHbCC-8ohxRXGwa4yjWzZDEOPzAsgL6CIyfZzva7rLY2ywNXk-6ganjIkRJz4Uo677Xdpp_020Yu7yjHeQ3KXnBGUruEuBHm4SgpXBylWGJnQWQ%3D%3D)**, Israel’s National Holocaust Museum and Memorial. ** **_The Hall of Remembrance is continuously illuminated by the Eternal Flame, pictured, its smoke escaping the building through an opening at the highest point of the ceiling._**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9rKAPGGn0DZ8Tlc6fD5ZjIFGzx5dQsB7g9MPMA1f9DY8xDwV4_XqLmhrWTWCgAZEBMaz7F1xV0j8Z0qVCXS_Ot_udR-UMJzQBDDnIfIL6u9RGHsKlPvpHuFK1jxMCTn634qCJb_IlqS8a09MCMFnJxXmM5UKFbV7a4tUVD-wjBOCKLy4XUX60I9J2EPP7lSK1xOkE3KUfggGkOmwt90BdMkyY4BeSYWjTuwWhN3mwxA1Tv73GNLhdXmR9-sV4RICpL-XXIK2KqWgx0KloEWX5fdDxQ1mzAe-zNHp1be979woGIsUrMoJssPDfhdi9sWlqvg15DI-zvvYnIo3ldXzK5I%3D)
---
| | _“A significant take away from our time in Israel was that_** _to eradicate antisemitism_** _once and for all,_**_we have to understand the trends that have allowed it to thrive and grow_** _throughout time, world wide.” _ **–Attorney General Miyares** **That’s why Attorney General Miyares sent a letter on Thursday to the Virginia State Police urging them to add antisemitism awareness training for new officer training and to recurring training for current officers. **_ _
---
[**READ THE LETTER TO VSP**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=60a40b8daa8842b68cee64111673784e&_e=3uoG2j3JrGBt7vQG_tzQ9jQElWoMqiLhhQSPQT198t1yfFRpmOH3UgHuSPJDr-2Cxhqpyt0ITl9dF8RvhFVZXbw1RGMcK3_u5ZtwBTC3_vQFoI4s448DHFc2ykOI9mDgSVGycO_xpHq8ZshVC1mfXXQHd_FJ1_NC3a9INnTwhrb3zRBZzvfs3toSL79vwULbAa03spo6SBH2PNDoYgx6_6BAMi3XEdygp4l5mgUN-5LqPk1jCU0ePqLPznWtc1xLaJSw9ScNdzmTStcvD6MfUBWFZsqwCPKy8hLFozpllJM%3D)
---
| | Until next time, Team Miyares
---

| | Our Official 2023 DLCC Membership cards are made specifically for you, to serve as a constant reminder that your membership helps fuel our work to:
* Elect strong Democratic leaders in state legislatures across the country who will fight for reproductive freedom, safe communities, and election integrity.
* Build long-term investments in our key target states so we can expand our razor-thin chamber margins.
* Compete against the GOP’s war chest of resources used to push their extremist agenda further in the states.

body:
I’m very happy to be writing to you from home in Braddock after seeking care at Walter Reed Medical Center.
#
**Hi Derek,**
I’m very happy to be writing to you from home in Braddock after seeking care at Walter Reed Medical Center. I’m excited to be the father and husband I want to be, and the senator Pennsylvania deserves. Pennsylvanians have always had my back, and I will always have theirs.
Clinical depression is no joke. After we won our race in November, my symptoms began to get worse. The whole thing about depression is that, objectively you may have won, but depression can absolutely convince you that you actually lost. That's exactly what happened — and that was the start of a downward spiral.
**[Earlier this week I sat down to share my story with CBS Sunday Morning to let others know that depression is treatable, that treatment works, and that we all have to take care of ourselves. You can watch that interview in full here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49682?t=1&akid=8318%2E434096%2EwO89qd)**
The care that the experts at Walter Reed provided changed my life. This isn’t about politics — right now there are people who are suffering with depression in red counties and blue counties. **If you need help, please get help.**
My staff told me that the #1 topic of calls to our Senate office every day has been well wishes, and that means the world to me. Thank you for your support.
With gratitude,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230402-8318-footer&t=2&refcode2=8318_434096_wO89qd&akid=8318%2E434096%2EwO89qd)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=8318%2E434096%2EwO89qd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8318%2E434096%2EwO89qd)

name: News Update
subject: Check out Nikki’s latest op-ed
body:
| | | We just wanted to reach out to make sure you saw Nikki’s latest op-ed in _National Review_. **[Read her full op-ed here.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=eb4972e0fb034a1e8fc0b9c13f531e53&_e=_C0dc59yT261_LV8RB2Ld_VxbgSViudwpmJ0N6QzqoUyYUczdAlMLqyMffM-JG0m0QJQFRJ2uCMHadYuvLaki3dJhNlDWhybJOZexkcZ4nWLb7rQYZn-udIJJTiBEV0V-FJIwRZKxgohJXHTZ3L-ME7nIHGnfVrXH_4WmPwQFh4gjVSiP5AKogIwEjc2CF-ymVhtSPiTcxurRVlCcfNgsk_yafcKu4ayRmV5yHDmfZcIfUee0DbMKlKg-nphQ-n-W_6H-U6HadOCjXSuq_R9fRqpL4neFt569ccFJ-sf1mM%3D)**
---
**[Ending the Fentanyl Crisis Starts by Securing the Border](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=eb4972e0fb034a1e8fc0b9c13f531e53&_e=_C0dc59yT261_LV8RB2Ld_VxbgSViudwpmJ0N6QzqoUyYUczdAlMLqyMffM-JG0m0QJQFRJ2uCMHadYuvLaki3dJhNlDWhybJOZexkcZ4nWLb7rQYZn-udIJJTiBEV0V-FJIwRZKxgohJXHTZ3L-MIuL32ra4qwUiuasGg9erIzo4aAkao7u47MutOsDzBEOl-k603srNkh4VzHwAy4ABs5Ls-z8Q8Qy6sS1dUBCrD86I_jvFreO3n0yG6bhK1DXi052mGXf7u2ZbI00WlNHKURPTBq7Kgprq7T86nXbCq4%3D)**** ** "In 2022, the Drug Enforcement Administration seized 50.6 million fentanyl pills and more than 10,500 pounds of fentanyl powder. That’s enough to kill every American. But that’s just what we caught. Huge amounts of fentanyl still made it across the border. It claimed the lives of up to 70,000 Americans in 2021 — a record, and up from almost zero a decade earlier. When the numbers for 2022 come out, the death toll may be even higher. It’s not just Salem: From the biggest cities to the smallest towns, dealers are killing more and more Americans with drugs from Mexico and China. Securing the border is the first and most important step toward ending this crisis. Yet the one person who can do the most to help is actively making things so much worse. President Joe Biden has spent two-plus years in office ignoring the border and undermining proven efforts to stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants. He has abandoned his duty to protect Americans, from Salem to San Diego to everywhere in between. The list of Biden’s offenses is depressingly long. He brought back the disastrous “catch and release” policy that lets drug runners go free after illegally crossing the border. He’s tried to end “Title 42” and ended “Remain in Mexico,” making it easier for people carrying drugs to get into America and stay here. Biden still refuses to crack down on “sanctuary cities” such as Lawrence."
---
[**Read More >>**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=eb4972e0fb034a1e8fc0b9c13f531e53&_e=_C0dc59yT261_LV8RB2Ld_VxbgSViudwpmJ0N6QzqoUyYUczdAlMLqyMffM-JG0m0QJQFRJ2uCMHadYuvLaki3dJhNlDWhybJOZexkcZ4nWLb7rQYZn-udIJJTiBEV0V-FJIwRZKxgohJXHTZ3L-MDGucERw1LgI4qB1Rhkma3F4KSfka7o4AX-5-NRjbXXYPczGTc08TehbUC1GIxE3HwonBcNlk2UBrbBk42Ga-HBNFoQzQHVuMe3lw4aJqi47NxZyEL3hWy5dy4rlA6MIPNe8sNpQm6mB2WLGEOfAKJ4%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baab1d736f24420289f89a9353d2ab7d&_e=h3ElqtmnP7Xhv18GOH99CMu4k9oRxVlGMkoblIkP91smRS2pkB-riFnvQhEDHVb4rZMScSSuQlvEb2GNz88GNT7bmiJN-t57k3Y6i95EDFQCxo1muOzwnsQVZjYn-lNVit3QQcNBVBQ_9sbKnq2O8OqhtbCX7fYzO2Bj_Uy8FIISVFVQbrSQ05Mc917DIMb_5m4rFUIqhxlfzELs1gnK_ARxvsUvLv1sQvTC51wlD8lT6NaYJkmXKUX2LybKmlS21Bs-VqmprMZfU2D5ApLLl1Bt7wqu913uC_kf7HN81QxcFnNJGdRz0jQ6dLf4gInxaGj-8-IaEwPgfMGJNhiou7_yfOshsaSsjojhqUZOqJfBJFT1M-EDs-BGRsUGGHXs3cPpZFP_r7NLvriTRnLLyw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.
Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer.
**Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.
The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first.
_**But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. **_
_**With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic.**_

clean_body: | | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have INDICTED me in a disgusting witch hunt. Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer. Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. Ever. From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement. Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement. The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first. But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! THANK YOU - LET'S SAVE AMERICA, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: My family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
They’ve endured some truly awful attacks...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFuwyAQRL8G32zBYmNz8KGplUuqqFEPrXqJMKwTUoMtGzfN3xdHaSWExJvZXXawZqKiuaC8kImpQVegdWJroMBpToFVHIBnsq0qNExRXUIX7SSnV-szM3jVm0uYFjdmenDJuTadREkplcxgKQ3ykjGhYj1nrZBUJX19DmGcCX8isI1nRr1MmMV2E5q1ycrUN6bK4WS1Si-D9SHtFm8mZWfrT2k0ORsCYrSKlkteaFkVXcGNEYRvl-CODo1dHOENOmV7AmKF87BMGiPU9qgeTCs3Knvykf7t_KcMPqAPUagKwSI8-t6a-Hy7KD_6V_xp7_BsTdymMS_sa1vuDyKZajNebd_bWZQxqNP6g3s6cVRvu1tNyg0BuNcB3IOAXb752Ivd-65J95-HMW1EkV9XFZ7jHW4j_lsfXbLHZkDK5hfYMIvx)
---
Patriot,
I knew what I signed up for when I first announced my campaign to take on the darkest and most corrupt forces in our nation’s capital.
I knew the storm I was walking into.
But, as I said at my last rally, I truly feel bad for my family as they’ve had to endure these vicious attacks as well.
**They’ve been smeared, slandered, and subjected to disgusting intimidation tactics.**
After all of the arrows they’ve taken on behalf of our movement, I want to do something special for them. ... _Because it certainly hasn’t been easy._

subject: ‘The View’ Hosts Celebrates Trump’s Witch Hunt Indictment
body:
AOC Runs Away From Libs Of TikTok: “You’re Actually Super Transphobic”

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654053%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ulm6UwCeVq6qpZBMxsx4DQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654054%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B%2fIjXlpMwpAcEGZsSPdgww&sysid=1 ‘The View’ Hosts Celebrates Trump’s Witch Hunt Indictment

In a recent episode of “The View,” the hosts talked about the indictment of former President Donald Trump. The discussion touched on important issues such as accountability for public figures and the potential impact on Trump’s family, including his grandchildren who may see unflattering images of their loved ones which many viewed as a strange point to make, showing their contempt for the former President.

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508128:6YrTZ_GAN:m:1:3391001263:5832C966CDC142D9E32C8015062FCE56:r)
---
Peter, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** Last week, Democrat political operative Lanny Davis bragged to Politico that he triggered the District Attorney's investigation of President Trump. Davis's claims might be pathetic puffery, but they provide an additional reason to believe that the District Attorney's unusual interest in President Trump has been based on _improper partisan considerations_ from the very start. **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**_WE WILL EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you! ** [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508128:6YrTZ_GAN:m:1:3391001263:5832C966CDC142D9E32C8015062FCE56:r) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller

name: Cori Bush
subject: Local elections matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
The people of St. Louis deserve leaders who will put the interests of the people before themselves, prioritizing those with the greatest needs first.
**That’s why I am proud to announce my endorsements for Alder races in St. Louis:**
* President of the Board of Aldermen - **Megan Green**
* Ward 3 - **Shane Cohn**
* Ward 6 - **Daniela Velázquez**
* Ward 7 - **Alisha Sonnier**
* Ward 14 - **Rasheen Aldridge**

While I’m fighting for St. Louis on the federal level, these powerful advocates running for Alderperson will fight for you on the local level. Elections like these are what impact the day-to-day operations of St. Louis and our communities — they are just as crucial, **_if not more crucial,_** than big national elections.
Now is the time to build the foundation for equitable, multi-generational change for our communities. [**Can I count on you to chip in today so we can provide the necessary resources to elect these progressive champions across St. Louis?](https://act.coribush.org/go/1103?refcode=em20230402-2441&t=1&akid=2441%2E1082990%2EGStokz)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/1103?refcode=em20230402-2441&t=20&akid=2441%2E1082990%2EGStokz)**
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori Bush

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/https%3A//secure.actblue.com/donate/ppac-em-20230402?refcode=em20230402-2441-footer&t=21&refcode2=2441_1082990_GStokz&akid=2441%2E1082990%2EGStokz) **

Patriot,
We are no doubt living in unprecedented and dark times for our once great country.
Our justice system has utterly collapsed under the political weaponization of what can _only_ be described as the radical Left’s tin pot dictatorship.
Not only is this Soros D.A.’s sham indictment – of which I am completely innocent – entirely un-American, but so are the Democrats who are cheering on and gloating for the FALL of our Republic...
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFuwyAQRL8G32zZi43h4ENTGlWK1EMPaW8RgXVCarBr40bp1xdbSSWExNthdnewKRjPS1bmAIlpQHPQOrEN5EDzCAtBKRWZESB4XVIVX1wpQcr8an1meq86cwnj7IZM9y45N5QXnB0RqOZHEC2USqBoaVuKHCtWiaRrziEME6FPBLbxTKjnEbNoN6JZTBamfjBVDkerVXrprQ9pO3szKjtZf0qjyNkQEKM017pGgXAUVZxYGEK3c3AHh8bOjlCJTtmOAFvg1M-jxgi1Pag708oNyp58pI-dH5XeB_QhFnjFFnjwnY3-cu_3QztL-ipXeLYmbiNV8f49K_7ylYyNGa626-zE6hjUaZlgTSe26mx7a0i9IQDrP4A1CNiVm883tvvYyVT-jphKVpXXpQrP8Q63Af-ld5fsvhmQWv4BNQeLsQ)
