Yes, you read that right. Nancy Pelosi, _who clearly has never read the Constitution once in her life_ , believes that I have the **“right to a trial to _PROVE INNOCENCE_.”**
In the eyes of the Left, you are simply guilty if they say so. That doesn't sound like America to me... _it sounds like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China._
I used to say we have a two-tiered justice system, Patriot. **But how can you have a two-tiered justice system when there is no longer _ANY JUSTICE_ to begin with?**
**Our country is broken. But rest assured, our incredible movement, our campaign, and my resolve will NEVER break. **
And to PROVE it, I’m counting on YOUR help to show just how much STRONGER and more UNITED our movement will become before I am ***arrested and arraigned*** this week.

clean_body: Did you see what Pelosi said? | | | Patriot, We are no doubt living in unprecedented and dark times for our once great country. Our justice system has utterly collapsed under the political weaponization of what can only be described as the radical Left’s tin pot dictatorship. Not only is this Soros D.A.’s sham indictment – of which I am completely innocent – entirely un-American, but so are the Democrats who are cheering on and gloating for the FALL of our Republic... | Yes, you read that right. Nancy Pelosi, who clearly has never read the Constitution once in her life , believes that I have the “right to a trial to PROVE INNOCENCE.” In the eyes of the Left, you are simply guilty if they say so. That doesn't sound like America to me... it sounds like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China. I used to say we have a two-tiered justice system, Patriot. But how can you have a two-tiered justice system when there is no longer ANY JUSTICE to begin with? Our country is broken. But rest assured, our incredible movement, our campaign, and my resolve will NEVER break. And to PROVE it, I’m counting on YOUR help to show just how much STRONGER and more UNITED our movement will become before I am *arrested and arraigned this week. | Thank you, | Donald J. Peter, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** Last week, Democrat political operative Lanny Davis bragged to Politico that he triggered the District Attorney's investigation of President Trump. Davis's claims might be pathetic puffery, but they provide an additional reason to believe that the District Attorney's unusual interest in President Trump has been based on _improper partisan considerations_ from the very start. **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**_WE WILL EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you! ** [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62508475:JL3yZ_GNa:m:1:3365131770:14BFC2D6ACCA45C5D398D8C7A0DB6B47:r) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
Earlier this week, we faced our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61188646/399341676/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDNjZGNmMC05MGQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bk553RbnVlcJHYiX6wTg_vq5Evstr1D6jgN7nrFXEmo=&emci=a9928758-eacf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=143cdcf0-90d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Earlier this week, we faced our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year. This was the most important deadline we've faced so far this year, which is why **I'm thrilled to share that we reached our fundraising goal!**

Soon, our fundraising numbers will be made public and national Republicans and my opponent will see that this grassroots team has what it takes to defend this seat again in 2024.

I can't thank you enough for your support, Peter. Reaching our end-of-quarter goal helps ensure we're prepared to win next year, no matter what attacks they throw our way.

We have a tough fight ahead of us, but I'm confident that we’ll be ready.

Thank you,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61188648/399341677/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230402_eoqty_enask_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230402_eoqty_enask_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=143cdcf0-90d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDNjZGNmMC05MGQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bk553RbnVlcJHYiX6wTg_vq5Evstr1D6jgN7nrFXEmo=)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: State Supreme Court ignores constitution
body:
The sad story that is Olympia, circa 2023, continues. The State Supreme Court is ignoring the state constitution. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662804:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r "Shift
Washington")
---
| Friends, The sad story that is Olympia, circa 2023, continues. The State Supreme Court is ignoring the state constitution. Democrat legislators have yet to reform their failed and deadly pro-criminal laws which they jammed through in 2021. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** This week's Newsmaker Interview is with Senator Lynda Wilson of Vancouver. Sen. Wilson is the Ranking Republican on the powerful Senate Ways and Means Committee. She provided her thoughts on the negative consequences of the Washington State Supreme Court's controversial and partisan decision to allow the Democrats to create a state income tax (starting with capital gains). And - among other thoughts - she also provided insights on Gov. Inslee hypocritically calling for borrowing billions for more new housing construction when it's many of his own policies which are the reason why our state has the most severe housing shortage in the country. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662805:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r "https://shiftwa.org/senator-wilson-think-of-all-the-lives-that-have-been-destroyed-by-the-democrats-lax-approach-to-drug-possession/"). ** ** **This week 's top story...** Two seemingly unrelated stories from last weekend portray perfectly how unchallenged one-party rule, fueled by liberal greed, harms Washington State. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662806:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r). ** ** **In case you missed it ... ** The Washington State Supreme Court chose to ignore the plain words of the state's constitution on the illegality of a state income tax. They declared that a capital gains income tax was - in fact - not a form of income tax. The strangeness of the decision and what might come next drew national attention. The state's foremost expert on the Democrat lust for a state income tax, the Washington Policy Center's Jason Mercier, was featured in Forbes, pointing out that "(w)ith this ruling, the rules surrounding income taxes in Washington are now unclear. What will be the next type of income tax to be redefined by lawmakers?" [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662805:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r)**.** **Your inspiration for the week ...** Life can get stressful - and the current state of the economy certainly does not help. But we believe it's important to sit back and appreciate the beauty of Washington. Here's a selection from the work of former Congressman Rod Chandler's beautiful photography to help us do just that: P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662807:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r). P.S.S. And remember you can start your Monday morning with a sneak peek at the Daily Briefing - for the rest of the legislative session - by tuning into the Commute with Carlson 570 KVI at 8:05, when he talks legislative politics with Shift co-founder Randy Pepple. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61662808:WBLL2hDNy:m:1:2610672541:7ED472F968E8EBFDC58574B403F024B1:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14172346&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWBLL2hDNy).

---
Peter, By now, we’re sure you saw the news that a Manhattan grand jury indicted Former President Donald Trump on thirty counts following an investigation in the scheme to pay hush money to Stormy Daniels ahead of the 2016 election. Former President Trump will **finally** have to answer for at least _some_ of his crimes in a court of law. This is the first time in American history that a current or former president will face criminal charges. But his supporters, Republican cronies, and allies on Fox News are already calling this a politically-motivated witch hunt — and we’re worried the Manhattan District Attorney’s office will go out of its way to avoid the appearance. Trump should NOT get any kind of special treatment when he turns himself in this week, as he’s expected to do. He should be treated like every other person in that building. [_**Sign our petition today demanding former President Trump receive NO special treatment in his upcoming arraignment this week. The stakes are sky-high – the Supreme Court race will determine the make-up of the court, the fate of Wisconsin’s abortion ban, and will have huge implications for the 2024 presidential election.
With a progressive candidate on the bench working toward fair maps, Democrats could FINALLY have a chance to build power in Wisconsin and fight back against Republicans’ right-wing agenda. **And if our progressive candidates win on Tuesday, we’ll have already hit the ground running.**
**Republicans have poured _millions_ of dollars into the state – they know that if Democrats win, their extreme, unpopular agenda doesn’t stand a chance. So it’s vital that we channel the full power of this grassroots movement into this fight. **
[So please: Will you chip in $7, $25, or whatever feels right today to elect state Democrats in states like Wisconsin? body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61189509/399345959/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230402TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmVjNWViMC05NmQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmIcga47Gg5xCuqVqqnhQf1sDZ-aGeded9AzjQvUWEI=)
---
Friend, thank you for everything you did to help out this past quarter!

Your support allowed us to gear up early for a tough fight in a district that will help determine control of the House. You stood with me in solidarity to support reproductive freedom, equality for all, and gun safety legislation. And you helped me show Kevin McCarthy that his MAGA Republican cronies are going to face a lot of opposition if they try to cut Social Security and Medicare or try to roll back the progress we've made on protecting the environment and lowering the cost of prescription drugs.

Soon, the first FEC reports of the year will go public, setting the narrative for this first stage of the 2024 election cycle. And I'm very proud of what we'll be able to show the Republicans who are desperate to take my seat.

You're why we've been able to come out of the gate strong, and I'm so grateful for all you do to strengthen our campaign.

Thank you again.

— Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61189510/399345960/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230402TY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmVjNWViMC05NmQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmIcga47Gg5xCuqVqqnhQf1sDZ-aGeded9AzjQvUWEI=)****

In 2022, Trump continued his assault on our democracy by supporting extremist Republicans who vowed to overturn future election results.
And in 2024, Trump is still promising to run for president even if he’s indicted.
Make no mistake, folks: An indicted Trump running for office would wreak havoc on the political process and make 2020 look tame.
With democracy STILL on the ballot, we need to do everything we can to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend our elections.

name: Bradley Whitford (via WisDems)
subject: I’m personally asking you, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Fighting like hell is how we’ll win in less than a week - and it’s how we’ll protect abortion rights for years to come in states like Wisconsin.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61189702/399347035/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQzOGFjMy05OWQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5M33qZgZeRYtEkzJ4ti0aUQ2MVpykPotAXdgGrbldY=&emci=93a47aa3-c1cf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=22438ac3-99d1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter,

This is Bradley Whitford. I’m an actor and you might know me as the character Commander Lawrence in _The Handmaid’s Tale._ Some of you might know a little bit about the dystopian world depicted in that show, but **I’m writing to you about the very real stakes for so many women and marginalized communities in Wisconsin** if we don’t act on this historic opportunity to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz and rebalance our state Supreme Court this Tuesday.

Peter, a criminal abortion ban from 1849 has been in place in Wisconsin ever since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. Governor Tony Evers has been fighting tooth and nail for reproductive freedom in the state, but with gerrymandered maps drawn in the GOP’s favor, things are dire in Wisconsin.

Here’s the good news though: **the team at WisDems has a historic opportunity to rebalance the state Supreme Court in their fast-approaching April election** \- which could bring them one critical step closer to fair maps and access to reproductive health access in Wisconsin. [_**Voters are casting their ballots in this election right now, and the WisDems need your help ahead of Tuesday’s election. Can you answer my call and split $15 between the WisDems and the Democratic Party of Georgia to support WisDems and progressives across the country like Judge Janet Protasiewicz? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61189703/399347036/52717194?refcode=20230402.2_BW_4D&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQzOGFjMy05OWQxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5M33qZgZeRYtEkzJ4ti0aUQ2MVpykPotAXdgGrbldY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

clean_body: Fighting like hell is how we’ll win in less than a week - and it’s how we’ll protect abortion rights for years to come in states like Wisconsin. | | | Hi Peter, This is Bradley Whitford. I’m an actor and you might know me as the character Commander Lawrence in The Handmaid’s Tale. Some of you might know a little bit about the dystopian world depicted in that show, but I’m writing to you about the very real stakes for so many women and marginalized communities in Wisconsin if we don’t act on this historic opportunity to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz and rebalance our state Supreme Court this Tuesday. Peter, a criminal abortion ban from 1849 has been in place in Wisconsin ever since Roe v. Wade was overturned. Governor Tony Evers has been fighting tooth and nail for reproductive freedom in the state, but with gerrymandered maps drawn in the GOP’s favor, things are dire in Wisconsin. Here’s the good news though: the team at WisDems has a historic opportunity to rebalance the state Supreme Court in their fast-approaching April election \- which could bring them one critical step closer to fair maps and access to reproductive health access in Wisconsin. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and the Democratic Party of Georgia: = = = = = = Abortion and reproductive health care are critical. It's a freedom that came after centuries of forced pregnancies and sterilization, high mortality rates, and countless acts of violence. Right now, Wisconsin is central in the conversation to fortify abortion rights. We can either elect pro-democracy, pro-choice leaders who fight like hell to protect reproductive freedom, or far-right leaders who will enforce an archaic abortion ban as the law of the land. We need to invest in Wisconsin like our rights depend on it — because frankly, they do. That’s why my friends at WisDems are counting on your help to raise an ambitious $250,000 before their FINAL deadline to organize and mobilize voters all across the state before their critical election on Tuesday. = Thank you, Bradley Whitford | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: National Democracy Summer School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?]“As a Democracy Summer Fellow, you’re not just going to change your life. You're going to change your country.” — Congressman Jamie Raskin Dear Friends: I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship program—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to training the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders. As part of this initiative, I am looking for XX dedicated high school and college students to join me as Wiley Nickel For Congress Fellows! This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a special curriculum designed by Congressman Jamie Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in NC-13. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! Additional information and the application for the Fellowship can be found HERE [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] . The priority deadline to apply is April 14th, 2023. If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email and remind them to select our campaign on the application—they won’t want to miss out! Apply Here [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] Thank you for your support, Wiley Nickel P.S. If you’re not a student, but still excited about Democracy Summer, you can support our participation in this enriching program by donating to my campaign here! Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?&recurring=true] Follow Wiley Online: https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc] Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Tt-P0CQ0-ke3ulUkLsfzZw2?unsubscribedata=RwqfBRmtaTcooDcRuDpoSQMbFIOI78DtbByB3aJ7RNz1bYcJEL7fdfJ08ff%2BYdNAeytwfe8Xzeg%2B1bITIm0q%2FpNWXti5icppYaF4rsmitLheLFBKPeQJ8hu3q6CGfp%2BLuTY8MXFAAs48kl3R03DKNUKmjjFbdGXXgnPlGtGeiCbmwsPkB2gFrYX0oWIkZYJ2D6kvwvG6c5edKJEaTw1y8DrfoBdGnk%2Bs12aXKffUURRXwiHyTIKNXzZXGifbplpOkGrSJTBVnPcX7JYYLbZQW%2FBP5SOwy4mlXUTl9V%2BkxEuDL%2FEppUSgulpZcEIIxT5AggpWaNjaCY7OlWa2QXLkPsuqbH684SmEcqsxd7hyY0cqjjxSbIIe7FFmQw2FvowAVcG8gmF1ApRU%2BrYM0H9m0CK5%2BSCeYpWdkxiHRCF1H74bhU9CslA14eChp2LVLhvN .

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Innocent wolf pups at risk of being VIOLENTLY MURDERED
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702942?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the Biden Administration NOT to remove life-saving Endangered Species Act protections for gray wolves!** Helpless wolf pups are already being brutally shot to pieces, violently run over by snowmobiles, and viciously choked to death by neck snares. Trophy hunters want nothing more than the freedom to _**RUTHLESSLY MURDER**_ these innocent creatures _**for sport or to claim animal body parts as souvenirs.**_ Now, GOP lawmakers are aggressively moving forward with their pro-hunting agenda -- they just introduced legislation that would completely _**REMOVE Endangered Species Act protections**_ for gray wolves. If passed, these bills would hand cruel trophy hunters the _**LICENSE TO MASSACRE**_ these already-vulnerable **keystone species.** Some states already allow the _**LEGAL slaughtering**_ of innocent gray wolves, so we can’t let hunting lobbyists succeed in **stripping away the ESA protections** these precious creatures have left. That’s why we _**urgently**_ need activists like you to speak up in defense of these voiceless animals before they are _**WIPED OUT**_ by vicious trophy hunters. **[Add your name NOW to tell President Biden to preserve ESA protections for gray wolves before we lose this iconic species forever!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702943?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702944?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In fact, Colorado has _**ONLY ONE SINGLE**_ wolf pack remaining in the wild -- and last year, _**3 of its youngest members**_ were found brutally **MURDERED** at the border of Wyoming, where it’s already legal to **MASSACRE** these helpless animals -- **_even without a permit._** These precious babies were introduced as part of Colorado’s recovery efforts and were among the _**first pups born in the state in over 80 years!**_
Federal courts have already recognized how fragile the gray wolf population is by **ruling to re-list them under the ESA last year.** We can’t let Republican legislators and hunting lobbyists _**REVERSE**_ this ruling, along with decades of progress in the recovery of this beloved canine -- __**we must hold elected decision-makers accountable to the law!**__
**[Are you going to allow merciless trophy hunters to succeed in eradicating the country’s remaining gray wolves? Or will you fight back now before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702945?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1702944?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being a voice for gray wolves,
Friends of the Earth**
|

_We report, you act._

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: National Democracy Summer School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?]“As a Democracy Summer Fellow, you’re not just going to change your life. You're going to change your country.” — Congressman Jamie Raskin Dear Friends: I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship program—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to training the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders. As part of this initiative, I am looking for XX dedicated high school and college students to join me as Wiley Nickel For Congress Fellows! This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a special curriculum designed by Congressman Jamie Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in NC-13. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! Additional information and the application for the Fellowship can be found HERE [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] . The priority deadline to apply is April 14th, 2023. If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email and remind them to select our campaign on the application—they won’t want to miss out! Apply Here [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] Thank you for your support, Wiley Nickel P.S. If you’re not a student, but still excited about Democracy Summer, you can support our participation in this enriching program by donating to my campaign here! Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?&recurring=true] Follow Wiley Online: https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc] Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Tt-P0CQ0-ke3ulUkLsfzZw2?unsubscribedata=3mLNa0ai18WZeq419vlUuhoklzypRmUkQvO3KoVt%2FNMfGHhruc%2Bs4kV6zZTFrSf0N0tyZxE9V%2BMnaZI1pSvQK4KVBPyGNib%2FQGIaW8lfBXR5O3WzBoGYOHpqEZR%2BOEq2Vn6LzD5wVhFkcZ7xqYvyoL2m6QsSRR%2BhqXSMPE4uxl%2BWoN%2FiwwX3EGL%2Fjrd%2BlnpM6lhy1ASdWdz2PAf3Qrj8K88UiQpc7jNWLXmaPQML%2FXKd%2FcUjDBTLCqrzqFrvVnJDR%2BNi718xqt9n3rUit3HVLCR%2Fe4Pr%2BNNJ%2FSO01Vqj%2BGIij83BV1%2B%2F5YB19AbKegf%2F9zWI%2FjYrVWQKxv0YREyKBG%2BrdrzRC1CQMqGLMj1oBHrABayqtxfnJ%2FI5eW6IOkTiArVeyiwg7hL8KtQAnjoO909KeOPuk%2Bg0%2BKeZbzyEY4HsXz2qeEZnL7Y0VxYyhfGh .

name: WI Election Monitoring Team
subject: The end of the race is near
body:
The information you need to know before Tuesday’s election in Wisconsin. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS4emVQyFMI62Wi6P4pzjHCC8ysJKUhKN-_0ajuWgwypn70HJiSRCyIxlEwcT5Yj6hu2CrbXdG5FsATHPHiu2zaM0cMWFf2WNCZrN6Rp6H4wgAAA3GiA6jjaEpcJQXd_6IO41em7WIHSlJnK8DcqHqkQQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, The year's most intense judicial fight is coming to a head in just a few days. For the last few months, two starkly different candidates have been warring for the empty Wisconsin Supreme Court seat. One candidate is a **[proven judge](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS4QLaW98dgBFJeYPCleA-ILQ2PoZgykGoy6FGVRiAF6w2ilGxG7PNfx109mWGdh-4NvVWyXsV19EvOIHJSFOXxLXh5jvUobkc5KxlFIpKtXVSvisk588ARNak06MpYwk7A1DSR21mJsEdym9lcu_f7Lg%3D%3D)** with a long history of upholding the law and protecting our communities. The other is a [**radical activist.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS4qLHG3MS4OHwj8AR6BJaAVQADi0RKrLj_wlXAswVCSqSy4ZgOpeQtj3PVoIGNY-5Q1dnFUbnWFIcNf-HSNZL3ikQwVTWr8o1nnZovkGrnctpWhiCBNl0XGGHUFie1XhLSFNIPxTR6H0mij5wOfRx7FA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS45ulcns7_fW_qq1t3-7FSlidm9gC9sPkyCC5SSn20q1dWlsobDIT8Ea98vGL-8qX1aGwSUm7btF8Cb56G5B7dL0Fdh-qu28vviKNKzS7u-O-x9GY5leB0T_Bbu4_CP3OAnhKnyf0xkezksVQb9Q6vLA%3D%3D)
---
Justice Daniel Kelly has the experience that Judge Janet Protasiewicz lacks. He served on the Wisconsin Supreme Court from 2016 to 2020. His tenure was marked by his rigorous scholarship, judicial humility, and unwavering commitment to the rule of law. As a Constitutional Conservative, Justice Kelly has a proven record of halting government overreach, protecting free speech, and preserving gun rights. When elected, Justice Kelly promises to always apply the law as written and never legislate from the bench. He has three ideals that he lets guide all his decisions as a judge: ✅ Defending Constitutional Rights✅ Preventing Judicial Activism ✅ Upholding the Rule of Law
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS4wTBh8vOWt1guor_BIwB8b6rvRNm0Op4NYAkZLEU_2EyoZwCICCMkp9R-5yFILAYkPsfEPETUfw-bQAaCmYA9VTnc_Z6SPkp5_7m0xLDUisMAv6sYhB0IH5az3cLW-d0gsoFoSLrWTr001dHJ8VbYFw%3D%3D)
---
Judge Janet Protasiewcz's career has earned her the nickname "**No Jail Janet**." She has a long history of letting violent offenders walk free. Janet has given light sentences to career criminals and no prison time to child sex offenders time and again. As a liberal activist, Protasiewicz's only goal is to shove her agenda down the throats of Wisconsinites. She wants crime to fill our streets and unrestricted access to abortion to become a reality. If elected, No Jail Janet's dangerous judicial practices will risk the safety of our nation. She also has three ideals that guide her decisions as a judge: 👎 Adhering to Partisan Politics👎 Practicing Judicial Activism👎 Destroying the Rule of Law
---
| | Peter, **the outcome of this race is in YOUR hands. Your vote will help decide who will sit on the state's highest court. ** But the election is just **2 DAYS AWAY** , and we want to be sure you have a voting plan locked in place. To learn more about the conservative, experienced candidate Justice Dan Kelly, visit: **[https://faircourtsamerica.org/2023-wisconsin-supreme-court-election-briefing/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNv8ynHANng0wBghA59iXH6hTvzxhUV8rSWUgPfqEk5w-938Tojs45oXgxK3txkmMgy6ksWHtx5ezz2ssXgqeeyQiWkD5VXosJCtf6IAH17TS4pvhKi0W9XjEfwIDD0uWBcgvKvKR-efuUg93XJHfoq4SUvqdwa7L-mgCW9yNzsHVzNb-OF7rteWAl3jlcmkr8F-NIOlS3gkRsCQyoVNpxoHZZGUFaFj6JTPQ5e2lVca34_GSVo4UeUvv8Rh4UcIiBfA%3D%3D) ** To check the status of and get more information about your voter registration, check here: ** To find your polling location, get hours of operation and directions, check here: **[https://myvote.wi.gov/en-us/Find-My-Polling-Place](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1ca6def86e28457c955468ace2566cc3&_e=UE7y88jm8TlMMOi2A9PNvydtNEex0kDN9uQb0GoX836odA1VXF2c39CmNObA28u-ETRs-YO3oTf4fP8DlZPrCrBjLwtJIhj9SKWT-6rG0XtHjdAkJ0InB6OYbx2r0qidW-jSSV1VmU2FyIpNVhILLBj0JOQq4J68mgK0YnBk0mNXhXhFHQzSCafQm1v902lAIZxpFwvHvqssC0F3pieLcTUa9tRf-ml052OnhOGzKY8%3D) ** **And lastly, remember to GET OUT AND VOTE on Tuesday, April 4th!!** In Justice, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts For the last few months, two starkly different candidates have been warring for the empty Wisconsin Supreme Court seat. One candidate is a with a long history of upholding the law and protecting our communities. The other is a | | Justice Daniel Kelly has the experience that Judge Janet Protasiewicz lacks. He served on the Wisconsin Supreme Court from 2016 to 2020. His tenure was marked by his rigorous scholarship, judicial humility, and unwavering commitment to the rule of law. As a Constitutional Conservative, Justice Kelly has a proven record of halting government overreach, protecting free speech, and preserving gun rights. When elected, Justice Kelly promises to always apply the law as written and never legislate from the bench. He has three ideals that he lets guide all his decisions as a judge: ✅ Defending Constitutional Rights✅ Preventing Judicial Activism ✅ Upholding the Rule of Law | Judge Janet Protasiewcz's career has earned her the nickname "No Jail Janet." She has a long history of letting violent offenders walk free. Janet has given light sentences to career criminals and no prison time to child sex offenders time and again. As a liberal activist, Protasiewicz's only goal is to shove her agenda down the throats of Wisconsinites. She wants crime to fill our streets and unrestricted access to abortion to become a reality. If elected, No Jail Janet's dangerous judicial practices will risk the safety of our nation. She also has three ideals that guide her decisions as a judge: 👎 Adhering to Partisan Politics👎 Practicing Judicial Activism👎 Destroying the Rule of Law | | Peter, the outcome of this race is in YOUR hands. Your vote will help decide who will sit on the state's highest court. But the election is just 2 DAYS AWAY , and we want to be sure you have a voting plan locked in place. To learn more about the conservative, experienced candidate Justice Dan Kelly, visit: To check the status of and get more information about your voter registration, check here: To find your polling location, get hours of operation and directions, check here: And lastly, remember to GET OUT AND VOTE on Tuesday, April 4th!! In Justice, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Trump for President 2024 DATE: April 2, 2023 RE: Political Update On Thursday, leftist Democrat District Attorney Alvin Bragg concocted a sham indictment of President Donald J. Trump. It is an unprecedented political persecution of the 45th President of the United States and a blatant attempt to interfere in the 2024 election. The American people and Republican primary voters, in particular, are outraged by the weaponization of our justice system by George Soros’ hand-picked and funded Manhattan DA against a completely innocent person and the leading Republican candidate for president. 83 percent think Bragg’s witch hunt is politically motivated, of likely GOP primary voters. An avalanche of recent polling shows President Trump surging to his largest-ever lead over Ron DeSantis. A survey released Saturday finds President Trump commands a 26-point lead over DeSantis — 57% to 31% — a net swing of 30 points towards Trump since February. | A poll released Wednesday indicates a majority of Republican primary voters support President Trump over DeSantis — 54% to 24% — doubling his lead, from 15 to 30 points, since February. | A released Saturday found President Trump leads DeSantis by 33 percent — 63% to 30% — more than tripling the margin between him and DeSantis since January. The survey also found President Trump leading Joe Biden 47 percent to 43 percent. In the 24 hours following the sham indictment, Americans from across all 50 states donated over $4 million to President Trump’s campaign, with over 25% of donations coming from first-time donors. An additional $1 million was raised in the second 24 hours. As the President’s America First movement grows, and grassroots conservatives coalesce behind him as the clear frontrunner, the Trump campaign is intensely focused on organizing nationally and building robust coalitions in key early states. Our political operation is led by loyal Trump lieutenants, accomplished political strategists, and dedicated volunteers. We are a small, disciplined team that runs every play like we are 10 points behind. President Trump recently returned to Iowa, home of the first-in-the-nation caucuses, where he . In Davenport, President Trump touted his lengthy record of fighting for American farmers and He pledged to reverse Joe Biden’s disastrous economic policies and defend parents’ rights. President Trump answered questions from the audience of 3,500 Iowans representing 77 counties — ten times the crowd of his nearest challenger. | “With the insane Green New Deal, Joe Biden is trying to totally kill Iowa ethanol. By contrast, I fought for Iowa ethanol like no president in history.” President Donald J. Trump President Trump made a visit to New Hampshire where he outgoing New Hampshire GOP Chair Stephen Stepanek would lead the campaign in the first-in-the-nation primary state. Since his visit to Salem, President Trump has recruited Ted Cruz’s former national field coordinator to his powerhouse team. President Trump remains committed to New Hampshire’s “first in the nation” status. | “As someone who has won the New Hampshire presidential primary not once, but twice, I know better than anybody what a special role this state and its people play in choosing America’s presidents.” President Donald J. Trump President Trump at the State Capitol in Columbia. It includes a roster of the biggest names in state politics, including Governor Henry McMaster and Senator Lindsey Graham. The campaign recently hired a state director that won the congressional 2022 race in the First-in-the-South primary. | President Trump poses with workers during his stop at Zesto in Columbia, South Carolina Last week, a massive crowd of over 25,000 patriots from 234 of Texas’ 254 counties gathered in Waco to welcome President Trump to the Lone Star State for his first 2024 campaign rally. President Trump promised to secure our borders, restore law and order in American cities, and unleash American energy independence. They're coming after you, and I'm just standing in their way.” President Donald J. Friends,
Illinois is a state that is as blue as it gets. Democrats control the governor's mansion, as well as both houses of the legislature. The levers of power for conservatives in the state are very small but, nevertheless, we have an IL Freedom Caucus in the legislature and they never stop fighting even when outnumbered.
At the beginning of this year's session, the ILFC [successfully](https://substack.com/redirect/9d0744dd-7baa-49a9-b179-d94c624796e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) petitioned House leadership to end their consent calendar, which allows them to pass hundreds of bills with a single roll call vote. This will ensure that every piece of legislation has a debate and a vote.
This week, the caucus also took the lead in standing up for the unborn in Illinois.
**ILLINOIS:**
Abortion fanatics in Illinois are trying to build a new abortion clinic in the town of Danville, an overwhelmingly pro-life area of the state. The citizens don't want this but radical Democrats running the state want to force baby killing on them and turn Illinois into the abortion capital of the midwest.
In response, the ILFC held a press conference outside the proposed area for the clinic to stand up for unborn babies and pro-lifers in Illinois.
You can watch some of those highlights here:
[Illinois Freedom Caucus 🇺🇸 @ILFreedomCaucusRadical Democrats have turned Illinois into the baby killing Capitol of the midwest. They are more focused on forcing abortion facilities on towns that don't want them instead of fixing our state's doctor shortage. The Illinois Freedom Caucus will always stand for life. #twill ](https://substack.com/redirect/f568370a-cd99-43a2-8d9d-a1076ede410f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[8:55 PM ∙ Mar 28, 2023
* * *
74Likes25Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/f568370a-cd99-43a2-8d9d-a1076ede410f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**GEORGIA:**
Conservatives in Georgia had several wins this week that it's hard to keep track of them all. Here is just a short list of achievements in the Georgia legislature that were championed by the GAFC:
* KILLED HB520 that would have massively grown bureaucracy to take care of every basic need of those with persistent mental health issues. It was a boondoggle to Georgia's taxpayers and the wrong way to go about taking care of mental health.
* PASSED SB1 that bans state and local governments from discriminating based on COVID vaccine status.
* PASSED SB140 that bans minors from going through dangerous and life altering sex changes.
* PASSED SB204 that prevents accrediting agencies from requiring DEI and CRT programs from being requirements for schools to be accredited.
* PASSED HB222 that makes Zuckerbucks illegal.
* KILLED HB200 that would have brought Ranked Choice Voting to Georgia.

**IDAHO:**
It was a very busy week in the Idaho legislature as two landmark bills championed by the IDFC to protect the Gem State's children successfully passed the legislature. One banned sex reassignment surgeries for minors and the other prohibited pornographic books from being put in school libraries.
[Idaho Freedom Caucus @freedomcaucusIDAfter rigorous debate, H314 has passed and is headed to the Governor for signature. Protecting children from porn is non-debatable. Thanks to all who worked hard to get this bill through both chambers. #idpol ](https://substack.com/redirect/1504d62c-0967-4bb9-a676-4d81e4cf738e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:36 PM ∙ Mar 31, 2023
* * *
18Likes5Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/1504d62c-0967-4bb9-a676-4d81e4cf738e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Idaho Freedom Caucus @freedomcaucusID#statefreedomcaucus #idgop #idleg #idpol ](https://substack.com/redirect/53752939-3c41-47ec-bb6a-81c1a2f2e09c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[7:23 PM ∙ Mar 27, 2023
* * *
16Likes1Retweet](https://substack.com/redirect/53752939-3c41-47ec-bb6a-81c1a2f2e09c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Despite the major wins in Idaho, the state legislature remains infested with RINO pollution. As our Idaho State Director Maria Nate [told](https://substack.com/redirect/1906b0af-f75e-4f56-b563-09208eab7da8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an Idaho newspaper "We're all fighting the same battles. The federal government is not where the problem is ... the federal government is a mess. The only way we can reclaim the federal government is for the states to reclaim their sovereignty."
**MONTANA:**
Speaking of bills to protect, the Montana legislature this week also passed legislation that was championed by the MTFC to ban minors from going through dangerous sex changes.
Thanks to our Freedom Caucuses, the left's sick agenda to confuse children about their gender and convince them to go through life-altering medical procedures at a young age is being taken down one state at a time.
[State Freedom Caucus Network @SFC_NetworkMontana SB 99 that would ban the mutilation of children with gender dysphoria has passed the legislature and is on the way to Gov. Greg Gianforte's desk. This happened thanks to the leadership of the @MTFreedomCaucus, which spearheaded the legislation to protect MT's children.](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6e64f0-7149-4e3b-99c3-95747fed5b74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[4:07 PM ∙ Mar 30, 2023
* * *
124Likes28Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6e64f0-7149-4e3b-99c3-95747fed5b74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**SOUTH CAROLINA:**
To round out the week, check out this [op-ed](https://substack.com/redirect/d73c012b-c6d1-4a1d-b21b-7ba55fa254aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) written by SCFC member Rep. Joe White, where he describes how the establishment Republicans in South Carolina have plotted to destroy the SC Freedom Caucus. Key excerpt:
> As the establishment elite squanders our money, as they pass laws, regulations, and rules to "fundamentally transform" our nation, and our state, we need to be aware that what they are asking you and me to do is bow to them and "kiss their rings of power."
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/f1f1a15a-5d56-4b48-9de5-38bb523c0c95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/db4015df-cc46-48bf-af8f-a79b14ce9bcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

President Trump has decided to conduct our campaign’s FIRST approval poll since the disgraceful INDICTMENT – and it simply wouldn’t be complete without YOUR input. | MARCH TRUMP APPROVAL POLL PARTICIPANT: dpwillis67@gmail.com POLL SUBMISSION DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.TONIGHT | When Democrats first impeached President Trump in 2019, they thought they had finally taken him down. Now, the President is CERTAIN that his INDICTMENT and looming ARREST will only make him surge even higher. And YOU can help prove it, Friend.
